LingFamily_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.en:
Hey,

Here's the thing: one of our haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and had to ditch their ship. Could you head over there and help us finish the delivery?

Not a huge job by any means, but you'll still need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with enough space to store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.
 
Drop the cargo off at the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll send you the creds.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.tr:
嘿，

事情是這樣的：我們的一位運輸員在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遇到了一些麻煩，不得不放棄他們的船艦。您能否前往那裡並幫助我們完成這趟運送？

這絕不是一件大工程，但您仍然需要一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 和一艘有足夠空間存放 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦。
 
將貨物卸在 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯，我們會將信用幣匯給您。

謝謝，
雷耶斯·林
貨運物流協調員
林氏運輸







林氏運輸深知宇宙充滿危險且難以預料，並制定了數項協議來保護您和我們客戶的貨物。為確保您不會因無法控制的情況而受到懲罰，總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。每次運輸都會設定交貨計時器。任何在到期時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為失竊並據此處理。所有提取和運送必須自動裝載或在貨運電梯進行。

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descript.en:
One of our pilots was supposed to bring a shipment back to us, but seems like he got into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Either he got his brains blasted all over the cockpit, or freaked out and ditched his ship. For his sake, I hope it’s the first one so I don’t have the hunt this asshole down. What’s important right now is that our cargo’s just sitting out there.

If you’ve got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a decent ship, can you head over there and get our stuff? Chances are the assholes who attacked my pilot are still there, and I’m betting they’re pretty tough.

If you get out alive, take the cargo to the freight elevator at [DESTINATION] and I’ll get you paid.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descript.tr:
我們的一個飛行員本來應該把一批貨物帶回來，但看來他在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>遇到了麻煩。要嘛他的腦漿被打得滿駕駛艙都是，要嘛他嚇壞了棄船而逃。為了他好，我希望是前者，這樣我就不用去追殺這個混蛋了。現在重要的是，我們的貨物就那麼放在那裡。

如果你有<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>和一艘不錯的船，你能過去把我們的東西拿回來嗎？攻擊我飛行員的那些混蛋很可能還在那裡，我敢打賭他們很難對付。

如果你活著出來，把貨物送到[DESTINATION]的貨運電梯，我就會付你錢。

史托斯，通話完畢。

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.en:
One of my haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and was forced to ditch their ship. I need someone to go there with <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to grab the cargo and finish the job.

They were carrying a decent supply of gear for me, and the last thing I need is for some do-gooder to come across it and trace it back to us.

If you do run into anybody, no need to be friendly. Just shoot the asshole and get my gear. Understood?

Take it to the freight elevator over at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a cut of the sale.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.tr:
我的一個運輸員在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>遇到了麻煩，被迫棄船。我需要有人帶著<EM4>一把重型牽引光束</EM4>去那裡拿貨，完成任務。

他們為我運送了一批不錯的裝備，我最不希望的就是被哪個好事之徒發現，然後追查到我們頭上。

如果你真的遇到任何人，不用客氣。直接斃了那個混蛋，把我的裝備拿回來。懂了嗎？

把它送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯，我保證你會分到一杯羹。

-圖奇

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descrip.en:
We got a situation. Some gang that no one’s heard of are trying to make a name for themselves by targeting our transport ships. They think they can make a big show of how tough they are raiding our haulers and acting like they’re big shots. Amateurs.

Problem is, they got lucky during their last attack. Our pilot barely made it out alive, but their ship is still sitting full of supplies over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Grab a crew you can trust and your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and get your ass over there.

After, drop the gear off at the freight elevator in <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. You do this for me and I’ll give you a good cut of the sale.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descrip.tr:
我們有狀況了。一些沒聽說過的幫派想藉由攻擊我們的運輸船來打響名號。他們以為突襲我們的運輸員，裝得像個大人物就能顯得自己很厲害。外行人。

問題是，他們上次攻擊運氣不錯。我們的飛行員差點沒命，但他們的船還裝滿補給品停在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。

帶上你信得過的人馬和你的<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>，趕緊過去。

之後，把裝備送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯。你幫我辦成這件事，我會給你一大筆分紅。

-圖奇

TheCollector_Ships_Firebird_Desc.en: Been digging into Aegis Sabre ship. Firebird is very bomb-y. Good build but could make some fun change to it. If you want, I can do. Have a look and tell me. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Firebird_Desc.tr: 一直在研究「宙斯盾」軍刀。 「焚鶯」的火力很猛。做工不錯，但可以做一些有趣的改變。如果你願意，我可以幫你。你看看再告訴我。再見。

cfp_hauling_intro_desc_001.en:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we need a package picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_hauling_intro_desc_001.tr:
歡迎來到這個星系，不確定你是否熟悉我們的組織，但繁榮公民組織是一個致力於為無主星系帶來安全與文明的非營利組織。

如果你正在這個星系尋找工作，並願意協助我們達成目標，我們需要你從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 取個包裹，並將其運送至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

完成後，我們可以在這個星系及其他地方提供你各種新的工作機會。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

TheCollector_Ships_Fortune_Indus_Desc.en: Hello, practicing on making ship fly better. Xi'an help human make ship. Fly good. Salvage good. But Wikelo can make better if you want. Bring things and will do. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Fortune_Indus_Desc.tr: 你好，我正在練習讓飛船飛得更好。 Xian 幫助人類造船。飛得好，打撈得也好。不過，如果你願意，Wikelo 可以做得更好。帶上東西就行了。再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_KopSkull.en:
Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. Use kopion skin for pattern and little skull dangle. Very effective. Shoot much better.

All you need is bring me parts to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_KopSkull.tr:
哈囉！如果你願意，我可以對槍枝進行有趣的改造。使用科潘塗裝作為圖案，並加上一個小骷髏吊飾。效果非常好，射起來更棒。

你只需要把零件帶到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>，我就會幫你製作。

掰掰

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_MiltSkull.en: Hello. Can do version of gun if you kopion soldier. Make material like soldier camouflage but with dead skull on front. Gun shoot better too.\n\nIf want, bring part to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will make.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_MiltSkull.tr: 哈囉！如果你是科潘士兵，我可以製作一把該版本的槍。材質就像士兵的迷彩，但前方會有一個顱骨。槍的射擊效果也會更好。\n\n如果你想要，把零件帶到 <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4>，我就會幫你製作。

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_003.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but to continue their efforts our scientists need materials that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar fangs</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have uncovered the existence of a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is offering premium pay to anyone who can assist with collecting the fangs.  

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_003.tr:
致所有可用的承包商：

我們 Rayari 正竭盡全力阻止再生科技危機蔓延，但我們的科學家需要公司供應商無法獲得的材料來繼續他們的研究。

Rayari正在尋找經驗豐富的承包商來收集<EM4>受輻射的瓦拉卡獠牙</EM4>，這些獠牙可以從遭受大量輻射的成年瓦拉卡體內提取。我們的掃描發現<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近的風暴中存在符合條件的族群。

由於這些動物非常危險，Rayari為任何能協助收集獠牙的人提供高額報酬。

獲得後，請將這些寶貴資源運送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

齊心協力，我們可以讓宇宙變得更美好。

Narina Lerrem
高級經理
臨床研究外包

Headhunters_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc.en:
We’ve been using the old Hathor <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4> as stashes, but it turns out some over-eager nullbrains sniffed them out and are trying to boost our shit for their own.

Luckily, the goods are still there - for now. We need someone to visit that PAF and OLP, grab our stuff from the freight elevators, and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> where we should be able to keep it on ice. 

Here’s the list of what to grab. Don’t care what order you do ‘em in. Be sure to bring a ship that can store <EM4>32 SCU</EM4> at the very least. 

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

Make sure you’re ready to deal with whatever assholes you run across. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc.tr:
我們一直在使用舊的哈索爾 <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> 和 <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4> 作為儲藏物，但結果發現一些過於急切的空腦子嗅到了它們，並試圖將我們的東西據為己有。 

幸運的是，貨物還在那裡 - 至少現在是這樣。我們需要有人去 PAF 和 OLP，從貨運電梯上拿走我們的東西，然後把它帶到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯上，我們應該能夠在那裡把它放在冰箱裡。 

這是需要抓取的物品的清單。不管你按照什麼順序來做。 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

確保你已經準備好處理你遇到的任何混蛋。

隨身帶著<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>是明智之舉。

- Stows

We’ve been using the old Hathor <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4> as stashes, but it turns out some over-eager nullbrains sniffed them out and are trying to boost our shit for their own.

Luckily, the goods are still there - for now. We need someone to visit that PAF and OLP, grab our stuff from the freight elevators, and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> where we should be able to keep it on ice. 

Here’s the list of what to grab. Don’t care what order you do ‘em in. Be sure to bring a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> at the very least. 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

Make sure you’re ready to deal with whatever assholes you run across.

Stows out.

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descri.en:
Here’s the thing, I got a situation over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and need someone with a brain between their ears to sort it out for me. Former pilot of mine thought he could cut a deal with another gang and unsurprisingly it didn’t work out for him. Now my cargo is sitting idle and being guarded by a whole bunch of nullbrains waiting for their hauler to come pick it up.

Need you to head there with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a strong crew to get my shit back before its gone for good.

Take it all to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll give you a generous cut of the takings.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descri.tr:
是這樣的，我在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>遇到了狀況，需要一個腦子靈光的人幫我解決。我以前的一個飛行員以為他可以跟另一個幫派做交易，不出所料，他搞砸了。現在我的貨物閒置在那裡，被一大群白痴看守著，等著他們的運輸員來取貨。

需要你帶著一把<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>和一個強大的團隊去那裡，在我東西永遠消失前把它拿回來。

把所有東西都送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯，我會給你一大筆分紅。

史托斯，通話完畢。

Headhunters_EliminateSpecific_PAF_desc_0.en:
Can’t believe how many criminals are crawling around this damn system. Guess we’ll have to make some room for ourselves. 

Got a list of high-level leaders here. Nothing brings chaos and disorder to the existing gangs like a good decapitation attack. The next target is <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who we’ve tracked to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Feel like ghosting ‘em?   

These old Hathor platform facilities are big and spread out. Doubt there’s a way to do this and not attract the attention of their foot soldiers. Ain’t gonna be easy but sure sounds like fun.

- Stows
Headhunters_EliminateSpecific_PAF_desc_0.tr:
真不敢相信這個該死的星系裡竟然有這麼多罪犯在四處流竄。看來我們得自己清出一些空間了。

這裡有一份高層領導的名單。沒有什麼比一次成功的斬首行動更能給現有的幫派帶來混亂和瓦解了。下一個目標是  <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，我們已經追蹤到他在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那裡，想悄無聲息地幹掉他們嗎？

這些老舊的哈索爾平台設施很大且很分散。我懷疑有沒有辦法在不引起他們小弟注意的情況下完成這件事。這不簡單，但聽起來肯定很有趣。

- Stows

headhunters_killship_xenothreat_ert_desc.en:
Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named [TARGET] who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard [TARGET] was spotted flying around [LOCATION], so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_xenothreat_ert_desc.tr:
這次任務需要你迅速行動。外禍威脅的一名中尉 [TARGET] 出現了，老大認為這是一次對付外禍威脅指揮層的大好機會。聽說 [TARGET] 最近被發現在 [LOCATION] 附近飛行，趕緊過去，趁他們還沒消失。

我建議你帶上一些支援，這種人物應該不會輕易倒下。

Stows out。


Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named [TARGET] who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard [TARGET] was spotted flying around [LOCATION], so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.

headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackGen_E_des.en:
Looking for some hitters to go drop some violence on some local dipshits who've been pulling jobs in the system against Headhunters. We tried reaching out to explain the error of their ways, but they shot our messenger, so now we go with option B.

You'll find them holed up near [LOCATION]. Go there and repaint the walls with their blood.

Have fun.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackGen_E_des.tr:
在找一些猛人，去對付那些在星系內對獵頭幫下手的地方混混。我們曾經嘗試聯繫他們，告訴他們錯在哪裡，但他們卻開槍打了我們的使者，所以現在我們選擇B方案。

他們現在躲在[LOCATION]附近。去那裡，讓他們的血液重新染紅牆壁。

祝你玩得開心。

Stows out。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- Yubarev 手槍
- Yubarev "幻影" 手槍
- Yubarev "點火器" 手槍
- DustUp 臂甲 戰術
- DustUp 胸甲 戰術
- DustUp 腿甲 戰術
- DustUp 頭盔 戰術
- Yubarev 手槍電池 (容量10)


<EM4>Potential Blueprints</EM4>
- Yubarev Pistol
- Yubarev "Mirage" Pistol
- Yubarev "Igniter" Pistol
- DustUp Arms Tactical
- DustUp Core Tactical
- DustUp Legs Tactical
- DustUp Helmet Tactical
- Yubarev Pistol Battery (10 cap)

TheCollector_Ships_Drake_Golem_Dec.en:
Universe need resources so Wikelo always respect people who dig. Good profession. If you starting and want boost to Golem ship. I can do. 

Bring. 

I make.
TheCollector_Ships_Drake_Golem_Dec.tr:
宇宙需要資源，所以 Wikelo 總是尊重那些挖掘資源的人。很好的職業。如果你剛開始，想提升魔象飛船的效率，我可以幫你。 

帶來。 

我做。

bitzeros_shipheist_M_desc_001.en:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. We’ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c
bitzeros_shipheist_M_desc_001.tr:
你覺不覺得如果有人想策劃一場大搶劫，他們就不應該該把所有細節都放在誰都能駭進去的 Spectrum 上？

不過，他們的損失就是你的收穫。我們很樂意把他們的重型貨運飛船的坐標賣給你，剩下的就靠你自己了。

看來他們的損失也是我們的收穫啊。

57 65 65 76 69 6c

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descri.en:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckin’. If you’re interested, you’ll need to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so there’s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at [DESTINATION] and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descri.tr:
剛收到消息，有一艘廢棄的船，上面有一大堆貨物等著被撿。如果你有興趣，你需要前往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。消息可能已經傳開了，所以那裡可能有一些渣滓在閒晃，但只要幹掉他們，把貨物弄到手就行了。

把貨物送到[DESTINATION]的貨運電梯，我就會給你錢。

確保你也帶了<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>，不知道那些貨物大小如何。

史托斯，通話完畢。

headhunters_eliminateall_xt_desc_001.en:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to [LOCATION] and take it back.

Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_xt_desc_001.tr:
很遺憾地，我們失去了其中一個前哨站，現在是外禍威脅的了。如果你問我，這真讓人難以接受，但這也是為什麼我們需要找一個有時間和充足彈藥的人來把它拿回來。

如果你覺得自己能勝任，快點去 [LOCATION]，把我們的前哨站給奪回來。

Stows out。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- Yubarev 手槍
- Yubarev "幻影" 手槍
- Yubarev "點火器" 手槍
- DustUp 臂甲 戰術
- DustUp 胸甲 戰術
- DustUp 腿甲 戰術
- DustUp 頭盔 戰術
- Yubarev 手槍電池 (容量10)


<EM4>Potential Blueprints</EM4>
- Yubarev Pistol
- Yubarev "Mirage" Pistol
- Yubarev "Igniter" Pistol

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_VH.en:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named [TARGET] who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at [LOCATION] who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. [TARGET] is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out [TARGET], they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_VH.tr:
我的老闆下達了命令，說我們要清算舊帳。我手上有條線索，這個叫 [TARGET] 的老練殺手，這傢伙積下了不少人命。我們得知他們跟一些不太喜歡我們的人藏匿在 [LOCATION]，所以他們可能不會對你友好。目標是 [TARGET]，但你可能得和他們打上一架。

再說一次，每次我們試圖幹掉 [TARGET] 時，他們都能反擊並殺掉追殺他們的人。我覺得你能應付得了，但如果有後援，最好還是帶上。

祝你好運。

Stows out。

headhunters_bombingrun_VE_desc_001.en:
Headhunters didn't get to be what it is today by playing nice. We've tracked down the hideout of a bunch of scraggy upstarts that have been making inroads into our territory. Need you to send a message.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and blow the crap out of their fuel tanks. They'll think twice about muscling in on our operations when their ships are grounded.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_VE_desc_001.tr:
獵頭幫能有今天可不是靠著溫良恭儉讓。我們追蹤到了一群剛起步的小混混的藏身處，他們一直在侵佔我們的地盤。我需要你給他們傳遞個訊息。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 並炸毀他們的燃料槽。當他們的船艦被迫停飛時，他們在試圖染指我們的行動前就會三思而後行了。

-斯托 留

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_S_Des.en:
The maintenance and reliable function of <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is pretty darn important to the Headhunters, but this rival crew seems determined knock it out of contention. They're on site now, targeting <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> there. 

Protecting the site, and any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4>, in the area is important enough that I want you to bring some <EM4>reliable backup along</EM4> when you go and terminate these nullbrains. 

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn <EM4>6 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow
HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_S_Des.tr:
<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的維護和可靠運作對獵頭者來說相當重要，但這個敵對的船員似乎決心要將其淘汰出局。他們現在就在現場，將目標對準了那裡的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>。

保護該地點以及該區域的任何 <EM4>友方飛船</EM4> 非常重要，所以我希望你在去消滅這些無腦傢伙時，能帶上一些 <EM4>可靠的增援</EM4>。

為了證明我們對做好這件事有多麼重視，主要承包商將獲得 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4>，以確保絕對不會出錯。

- Stow

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_S_.en: Our partners at [LOCATION] need help. A rival outlaw crew are swarming the area and attacking the [OBJECTS] there. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site is absolutely critical to our future plans in the area and its damn important that it remains in working order. With the scale of this attack and the skill of these pilots, there's no doubt that some reliable backup would serve you well. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and stop these bootlicks before they can do any lasting damage. To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn 9 Council Scrip for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong. - Stow
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_S_.tr: 我們在 [LOCATION] 的合作夥伴需要幫助。一個敵對的亡命之徒團隊正蜂擁至該地區並襲擊那裡的 [OBJECTS]。這本來就夠糟了，但這個地點對我們在該地區的未來計畫絕對至關重要，而且它保持運作非常重要。 考慮到這次襲擊的規模和這些飛行員的技術，毫無疑問，一些 可靠的增援 會對你有幫助。召集你的船員，飛往現場，在這些馬屁精造成任何持久破壞之前阻止他們。 為了證明我們對做好這件事有多麼重視，主要承包商將獲得 [SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣，以確保絕對不會出錯。 - Stow

TheCollector_Ships_Guardian_Desc.en: This ship look like insect in the Protectorate. Fun look. Painful sting. Wikelo can make custom version for you if you want. Make enemies sting. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Guardian_Desc.tr: 這艘船看起來像守護者裡的變體。造型有趣。刺痛感很強。 Wikelo 可以為你定製版本，讓你的敵人也蜇人。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_GuardianQI_Desc.en: Insect ship again. This one help take down other ship but if you want it to take down better. Can make. See list and tell Wikelo. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_GuardianQI_Desc.tr: 像外星船。這艘船能幫忙擊落另一艘船，但如果你想讓它擊落得更好，那就更好了。可以自己造。查看清單，然後告訴 Wikelo。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_GuardianMX_Desc.en: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_GuardianMX_Desc.tr: 你們人類喜歡奇怪字母組合。很有趣。守護者船艦很有用，但如果你想要更有用，帶東西給我。我給你更好的船艦。看起來更好。用起來更好。\n\n謝謝你。再見。

Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_Super_0.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: An operator working with InterSec is currently being attacked by Vanduul ships at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The likelihood of them surviving on their own is low, so we’re looking for a contractor willing to provide combat support.  

Contractors accepting this mission should be well supplied and ready to face the Vanduul threat head-on. 

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_Super_0.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：Vanduul
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦
簡報：一名與 InterSec 合作的特工目前在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭到 Vanduul 船艦攻擊。他們獨自生存的可能性很低，因此我們正在尋找願意提供戰鬥支援的承包商。

接受此任務的承包商應有充足的補給，並準備好正面迎戰 Vanduul 的威脅。

此致，

Deacon Tobin
營運經理
InterSec 防禦解決方案

此通訊包含機密資訊，僅供指定收件人使用。如錯誤接收，請忽略並通知寄件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，且必須在適用情況下遵守 UEE 及星系法律。

headhunters_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_00.en:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out
headhunters_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_00.tr:
你一直為我們做得很好，所以我有個小忙要請你幫忙。我還是會付錢給你，但這算是個人請求。有些貨物需要從 [LOCATION] 送到 [DESTINATION]，而原本負責的人不幸處在了錯誤的空氣閥那一邊，但事還是得做。

唯一的問題是，你得有一艘能載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 容量貨櫃的船</EM4>。隨身帶著<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>是明智之舉。

如果你能幫忙處理這件事，那就太好了。

Stows out。

Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

cfp_defend_headhunters_H_desc_001.en:
A distress call just came in from [LOCATION] claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_headhunters_H_desc_001.tr:
剛剛收到來自 [LOCATION] 的求救訊號，聲稱一支龐大的獵頭幫部隊剛剛攻擊了我們那裡的前哨站。根據逃出現場的人員報告，已經有多人死亡和受傷。我們正在尋找任何可用的安保人員前往那裡並奪回前哨站。

目擊者指出攻擊者是精英獵頭幫執法者，所以請小心並且如果能夠的話帶上支援。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_defendship_LRT_PA_desc_001.en:
You busy? A promising prospect was doing a special run for me but ran into trouble with the People’s Alliance around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. This one’s on me. Knew they weren’t the best dogfighter but thought they could do this without running into any other ships. 

Told ‘em to hold tight and do everything they can to stay alive until support gets there. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for someone with your skillset.  

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_LRT_PA_desc_001.tr:
你忙嗎？一個有前途的新人正在為我執行一項特殊任務，但在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近與人民聯盟發生了衝突。這件事怪我。我知道他們不是最好的纏鬥飛行員，但以為他們可以在不遇到其他船隻的情況下完成任務。

告訴他們要堅持住，盡一切可能活下來，直到支援到達。對於你這樣技術的人來說，應該不會太麻煩。

-史托斯

headhunters_defendship_LRT_desc_001.en:
Just got word that a Headhunter over near [LOCATION] got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_LRT_desc_001.tr:
剛收到消息，[LOCATION] 附近有個獵頭幫成員被捲入了一場戰鬥，現在他無法解決這個問題。那個傻瓜還要求我來救他。

看來我真的是個好人，因為我竟然決定付錢讓你去幫我處理。怎麼樣？願意救個傻瓜一命嗎？

Stows out。


Just got word that a Headhunter over near [LOCATION] got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows

headhunters_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.en:
Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near [LOCATION]. Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out
headhunters_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.tr:
聽說有些新來的傢伙想擠進我們的生意，結果竟然對一艘獵頭幫飛船下手，真是不知道自己在做什麼。

這些傢伙得學個教訓，告訴他們在派羅可不是這麼玩的。你準備好過去給這些混蛋上一課了嗎？

Stows out。


Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near [LOCATION]. Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out

headhunters_defendship_MRT_desc_001.en:
One of my pilots wasn't thinking straight and got themselves mixed up in a heap of trouble over at [LOCATION]. 

The real kicker is the fool has a full hold. Can't really afford to lose the stuff they're carrying, so I'd appreciate it if you could go bail them out for me. 

- Stows out
headhunters_defendship_MRT_desc_001.tr:
有一個我的飛行員沒想清楚，搞砸了，現在在 [LOCATION] 陷入了大麻煩。

最麻煩的是那傢伙的貨艙裡滿是貨物。實在無法承擔損失，我會很感激你能幫我把他救出來。

Stows out。



Stows out。


One of my pilots wasn't thinking straight and got themselves mixed up in a heap of trouble over at [LOCATION]. 

The real kicker is the fool has a full hold. Can't really afford to lose the stuff they're carrying, so I'd appreciate it if you could go bail them out for me. 

- Stows out

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_VE.en:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of [LOCATION]. 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_VE.tr:
最近我們收到事件報告，許多在星系內的繁榮公民承包商遭遇了從 [LOCATION] 展開行動的不法分子狩獵小隊。

為了協助在該區域重建更安全的航線，我們將派您前往那裡與這些不法分子交戰。該團體已知會組成小隊旅行，所以重要的是您和您帶來的任何後援必須在該區域等待以解決他們所有人，否則威脅可能會繼續存在。

感謝您幫助我們，
莉瑪·安迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_HHAttack_M_desc_001.en:
We just received a frantic comm from [LOCATION] and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_HHAttack_M_desc_001.tr:
我們剛剛收到來自 [LOCATION] 的緊急通訊，正在尋找任何可行動的戰鬥專家來幫助擊退獵頭幫的攻擊。 現場仍有敵人，有數人傷亡的報告，所以我們需要迅速處理此事。

一旦被接受，我將提供所有相關情報。 感謝您的協助。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織


We just received a frantic comm from [LOCATION] and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Headhunters_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.en:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>7 Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows
Headhunters_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.tr:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows

headhunters_defendship_VLRT_PA_desc_001.en:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_VLRT_PA_desc_001.tr:
看來有些人就是不會纏鬥。派了一個年輕的新人去巡邏，現在卻被他的通訊轟炸，說他快撐不住了。我讓他告訴我對手的詳細情況，我聽了差點笑得從椅子上摔下來。

如果這小子連一艘人民聯盟的船都搞不定，他肯定還沒準備好執行飛行任務。不過還是麻煩你救他一命。

如果你有空，可以去<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>教教他們怎麼做嗎？

-史托斯

Foxwell_EliminateAll_Allies_desc_001.en:
Got word that outlaws are attempting to overrun <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. There’s local security forces there, but they’re struggling to stop that attack.

Need a contractor to hustle there and help take care of the aggressors. Bring plenty of gear, and be careful when engaging targets. Don’t want to hear about any security team members getting caught in your crossfire.    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_Allies_desc_001.tr:
聽說有不法之徒企圖佔領 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。當地有保全部隊駐守，但他們正難以阻止這次攻擊。

需要一位承包商趕往該處，協助處理這些侵略者。請攜帶充足的裝備，並在交火時務必小心。我們不希望聽到任何保全隊伍成員被你的流彈波及。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descri.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got a transport in need of backup over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Signal was patchy, but their comms made it sound like a group of outlaws had gotten wind of what they were hauling and attempted to take it from them.

Considering the state of things before we lost contact, I'm considering this a recovery mission. Multiple hostiles are expected at the site, so a skilled crew is crucial for the success of this operation. There will be a high volume of cargo to deal with, so a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> will be needed. 

Upon successful extraction of cargo, deliver to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descri.tr:
埃克哈特保全公司
合約與調度部門

合約類型：尋回貨物
批准代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

急件處理

一艘運輸船在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 急需支援。訊號斷斷續續，但從他們的通訊中聽起來，一群不法分子已經得知他們所運送的貨物，並試圖從他們手中奪取。

考量到失去聯繫前的狀況，我將這視為一項尋回任務。預計現場會有多名敵軍，因此一支熟練的團隊對這次行動的成功至關重要。將有大量貨物需要處理，因此您將需要一艘能裝載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦和一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

成功取回貨物後，將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。

本合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權及/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定之個人或實體使用。

EckhartSecurity_EliminateBoss_DC_Desc_00.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve received actionable intelligence on a dangerous bounty, who’s turned out to be extremely elusive. <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was spotted with a dedicated contingent of known associates at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’re looking for a contractor ready and willing to execute this bounty before they disappear again.

Based on previous attempts to apprehend this criminal, there’s a good chance that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> will try to avoid a direct confrontation, and instead send their allies to confront you. We believe that neutralizing these protective forces, and shredding the safety net they provide, is the best way to draw out <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> to face you directly. 

Expect to confront a significant and skilled force. We advise that you plan accordingly. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_EliminateBoss_DC_Desc_00.tr:
"Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：獵殺賞金目標
授權代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

我們收到了關於一位危險賞金目標的可執行情報，這位目標非常難以捉摸。<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 被發現與一群已知的同夥在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。我們正在尋找一位願意且準備好在他們再次消失之前執行此賞金的承包商。 

根據之前逮捕這位罪犯的嘗試，<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 很可能會試圖避免直接對抗，而是派遣他們的盟友來對付你。我們認為，消滅這些保護力量，並粉碎他們提供的安全網，是引誘 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 直接面對你的最佳方式。 

預計會遇到一支強大且熟練的部隊。我們建議你做好相應的計畫。合約成功完成後將發放款項。

此合約不可協商。

本合約不開放任何議價與協商。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。"

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_S_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we sent a contractor after a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who was leading a crew targeting the operations of an extremely important client. Unfortunately, it was a trap and we lost some good people. We can’t let the target get away again, so we’ve decided the best course of action is to give them a dose of their own medicine.  

Ambushing this target seems like the safest course of action, and we’ve identified a good spot for such an attack. There’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that the target and their crew frequently fly by. You can power down your ship and hide there until you’re ready to strike. This crew is ruthless and extremely skilled. Don’t make the same mistake as the previous contractor and go this alone. It would be best for you to bring a few trusted friends to help handle this crew.    

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Plus, we’ll throw in a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor for taking care of this.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_S_desc.tr:
埃克哈特保全有限責任公司
合約與派遣

合約類型：船艦伏擊
批准碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

立即處理

最近，我們派了一名承包商去追捕一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，它正領導一個團隊，專門攻擊一位極重要客戶的業務。不幸的是，那是一個陷阱，我們損失了一些好手。我們不能再讓目標逃脫，所以我們決定最好的辦法就是以其人之道還治其人之身。

伏擊這個目標似乎是最安全的做法，我們已經找到了一個適合這種攻擊的好地點。在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近有一個<EM4>輻射雲</EM4>，目標和他們的團隊經常飛經那裡。你可以關閉你的船艦動力並躲在那裡，直到你準備好出擊。這個團隊殘酷無情且技術高超。不要犯下前一個承包商的錯誤，單獨行動。你最好帶上幾個信任的朋友來幫助處理這個團隊。

付款將在合約成功完成後發放。此外，我們還會為主要承包商提供<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎金來處理這件事。

此合約不可協商。

Got a big one here. We need a team to head out to [LOCATION]. Word is CFP are dug in at three different clusters in the area. Our judge wants them all cleared out. Seems one of their mercs, a real mean skag named [TARGET], is holed up at one of them. We want you to go there, clear them all out and take out [TARGET].

Get yourself a nice little payday in the process.

Stows out.

完成後，還能賺個漂亮的報酬。

Stows out。

headhunters_ChainElimAll_Boss_XenoThreat.en:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at [LOCATION] to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_Boss_XenoThreat.tr:
這些外禍威脅混蛋就像是臭蟲，每次你以為已經消滅了他們，他們就又冒了出來。他們似乎又開始做些老調重彈的事情，打算搞個大規模的計劃。不知道是什麼，但我們已經被授權在它開始之前給他們停手。

有一群外禍威脅的大佬據說會在[LOCATION]開會，無論是策劃還是發洩怒火，總之我們要給他們一個教訓。或者說，你來給他們一個教訓。

前往那裡，消滅所有你能找到的。肯定的，我敢打賭那些大佬們會跳出來參與戰鬥，這是他們的老把戲。

這會是一場硬仗。雖然我痛恨外禍威脅，但他們可真是能打，所以小心點，如果能的話，帶上幫手。

Stows out。

headhunters_EliminateAll_XenoThreat_H_de.en:
One of our people stumbled across a group of XenoThreat hiding out over near [LOCATION]. Not sure if they're dug in or just passing through, but we want to hit them before they move.

Maybe bring some people if you got 'em because XenoThreat don't tend to go down easy. Get there and remind them who the power is in this system.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateAll_XenoThreat_H_de.tr:
我們的人在[LOCATION]附近發現了一群外禍威脅。不確定他們是打算扎根還是只是路過，但我們要在他們動身之前先下手為強。

如果有夥伴就帶上，因為外禍威脅可不是那麼容易對付的。趕過去，讓他們記住這個星系的真正霸主是誰。

Stows out。

Need someone to sweep [LOCATION]. CFP security forces seized the outpost from a group of locals that'd been there for years. Beat the hell out of 'em from what I heard, so they came to Headhunters asking for revenge. 

Need it done fast and clean. 

Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_E_desc_001.tr:
需要人去掃蕩 [LOCATION]。CFP 的安保部隊把當地一群經營多年的居民基地給佔了，據說還把人打得很慘，這群人最後來找了我們求報仇。

這事得快速而乾脆地處理掉。

Stows out。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NonePistol.en: You need a good weapon, yes? Have one for you. Small but powerful. Like an extra spicy balalu pepper. Wikelo make this pistol look extra spicy too. You bring things I need and I do a trade.\n\nBye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NonePistol.tr: 你需要一把好武器，對吧？這裡有一把給你。小但強大。就像一顆特辣的 Balalu 辣椒。Wikelo 讓這把手槍看起來也特別火辣。你帶來我需要的東西，我們就做交易。\n\n再見。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>16 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.tr:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Our client has requested the immediate destruction of a group of servers located at a long-shuttered ASD research site. The servers in question contain information that our client considers extremely damaging and is eager to see the data completely eliminated.

Initial surveillance indicates the servers are within the facility’s <EM4>Energy Lab, located in the Research wing</EM4>. We’ve also picked up on a number of hostile forces, so be on alert.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.tr:
Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：銷毀伺服器
授權代碼：VS-14

需要立即處理

我們的客戶要求立即摧毀位於一處關閉已久的 ASD 研究站內的一組伺服器。這些伺服器包含客戶認為極具破壞性的資訊，且客戶急於看到這些數據被徹底消除。

初期偵察顯示，伺服器位於該設施的<EM4>研究大樓能源實驗室</EM4>內。我們還發現了多個敵對勢力，請保持警惕。

成功完成合約後將發放報酬。

本合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權及/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

RepairOxygenKiosk_DescriptionLong.en:
Hello Guests,

We have recently been alerted that one of our Oxygen Dispensers has suffered a technical error. As you know these kiosks are vital to ensure that you have plenty of oxygen handy while participating in our Work Release Program.

We are looking for any available guest to reset the kiosk. That should reconnect the kiosk to the network and resolve the issue. The first guest who's able to complete this task will not only be compensated with merits, but also with the satisfaction that they're making the workplace safer for other guests.

Thank you.
RepairOxygenKiosk_DescriptionLong.tr:
您好，我們的「貴賓」，我們不久前收到警報，有一台氧氣供應機出現技術故障。眾所周知，這些氧氣供應機是用來確保各位在參與我們的勞動減刑計劃時能有充足的氧氣而設置的。

我們需要一位「貴賓」去重新啟動氧氣供應機。這個動作能將氧氣供應機重新連上網路，並解決這個問題。第一位完成任務的人不僅會得到功績點獎勵，更會為其他人的工作奠定安全的基礎。

感謝您的配合

Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_H_desc.en:
Native plants and animals near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are on the verge of environmental collapse due to the dramatic population spikes of several invasive species. We’ve been contracted to dramatically reduce the current population of these species to help avoid an environmental collapse. We need a dedicated and highly skilled exterminator to carry out this contract.     

You can better acquaint yourself with the creatures in question by referencing <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_H_desc.tr:
<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近的原生植物和動物，由於幾種外來物種的數量劇烈暴增，正瀕臨環境崩潰的邊緣。我們已受委託要大幅降低這些物種目前的數量，以協助避免環境崩潰。我們需要一位敬業且技藝高超的除害專家來執行這份合約。

有關目標動物的進一步細節，請參考您日誌中的 <EM4>《史丹頓野生動物指南》</EM4>。

敬上

Wanda Werkheiser
合約經理
高點荒野專家

CFP_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001.en:
Hey,

We’ve got an opportunity for any haulers interested in lending a hand or two to Citizens for Prosperity.

There’s a box that needs to be moved from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Shouldn’t take long, if you’re around the outpost and available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001.tr:
嘿！如果任何有興趣向繁榮公民組織提供一些幫助的搬運工，我們這裡都很歡迎。

有一個箱子需要從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。如果你在前哨附近而且碰巧有空的話，那麼這應該不會花太多時間。

另外，為了讓你的生活更輕鬆，我會確保你已經隨身攜帶<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

CFP_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_001.en:
Hi,

Citizens for Prosperity needs help moving supplies around one of our outposts. The boxes need to be picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Doesn’t sound too difficult, does it? Just make sure you’re wearing a comfy pair of shoes. Also, to make your life easier, I'd bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_001.tr:
嗨！我們需要有個人幫我們在一個前哨站周圍運送補給品。需要從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 領取箱子並運送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

聽起來不難，對吧？你只要有雙舒適的鞋子就行了。

另外，為了讓你的生活更輕鬆，我會確保你已經隨身攜帶<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

CFP_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
邊境的生活很艱難，每一次向我們的定居者運送物資都很重要。我們今年真的承受不起更多的損失了。

我們的一家主要供應商在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭到了不法分子的襲擊並失去了聯繫。我做了最壞的打算，但如果我們還能找回他們運輸的物資，這將會帶來巨大的改變。

襲擊他們的不法分子很可能還潛伏在附近，所以請保持警惕。一旦您解決了他們，拿走貨物並將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。請確保您駕駛的船艦能夠裝載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>，並記得帶上 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

祝您飛行平安，

莉瑪·安迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

Foxwell_X2_ShipWaves_Desc.en:
Multiple reports are coming in of XenoThreat ships massing at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
We're looking for contractors ready to take the fight to them. 

They want us to believe that they have right on their side. They want us to believe that they have overwhelming force. This is a chance to show them we know better.

I won't lie, this is more than just a simple security contract to me. I really hate those intolerant assholes and everything they stand for.

You with me?

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_X2_ShipWaves_Desc.tr:
多份報告稱外禍威脅的飛船正在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 集結。
我們正在尋找準備好向他們發起攻擊的承包商。

他們想讓我們相信真理在他們那邊。他們想讓我們相信他們擁有壓倒性的力量。這是一個向他們展示我們懂的更多的機會。

我不會說謊，對我來說，這不僅僅是一份簡單的安全合約。我真的很討厭那些不寬容的混蛋以及他們所代表的一切。

你跟我一起嗎？

Kevin Walton
調度員，Foxwell Enforcement
「保全，如你所願」

Foxwell Enforcement 是獲准在整個 UEE 營運的有擔保保全專家。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的大家庭。如果你或你認識的人有興趣，請聯繫我們的合約代表之一。

RAIN_intro_desc_01.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_intro_desc_01.tr:
致所有可用的承包商：

Rayari 有限公司正在尋找獨立承包商，以提供額外支援，協助我們在帝國及其他地區拓展科學、農業和醫學的疆界。

位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的一項研究計畫急需資源，因此我們正在尋找可靠的承包商來取得並交付這些關鍵組件。

如需更多關於目標動物的資訊，請參閱您日誌中的<EM4>《史坦頓野生動物指南》</EM4>。

Rayari 提供優渥的薪資，同時讓您知道自己正在建設一個更美好的宇宙。

讓我們一同成長

Narina Lerrem
資深經理
臨床研究外包專案

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio.en:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but I’d wager there’s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopion carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And don’t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio.tr:
找個貨運員幫我取些貨。問題是，有個條件。

貨物在一艘位於<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的廢棄船的後艙裡。你可能已經猜到了，這不是我們的貨物，但它也絕對不應該落入別人手中。我絕不允許那些繁榮公民會的混蛋在我們之前拿到它。

如果我們是第一個知道這件事的，那就太幸運了，但我敢打賭，那裡盤旋的船隻會比科皮安獸屍體上的蒼蠅還多。如果你有可以信任的夥伴，帶上他們，幹掉那些混蛋。當然，別忘了你的<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

你設法弄到那些貨物，把它送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯，我能給你一大筆分紅。

史托斯，通話完畢。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案件編號：JD10285  
首席調查員：亞肯·馬洛爾  

案件更新：  
從在 Onyx 設施中回收的人士檔案中，我們現在得知，喬里特博士最近曾訪問過該設施並在此期間查閱了相關文件。下一步我們將沿著這一線索展開調查，試圖弄清楚喬里特博士在他原來的實驗室中究竟在做什麽。

合約調查員行動：  
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>部門並<EM4>訪問喬里特博士的最新文件</EM4>。

附加說明：
註意現場可能存在的敵對勢力。

為前往 Onyx 設施，請駕駛可存放在大型機庫的載具。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M3_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency

Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update:
The files you found in Engineering confirm that Dr. Jorrit is actively pursuing something at the site, but it is still unclear what the doctor is up to. I’m hoping that if you can find the data he was accessing in Research it will provide further clarity.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing to locate and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4> .

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you accessed these files, I'll be sending you <EM4>5 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of whatever data we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M1_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案件編號：JD10285  
首席調查員：亞肯·馬洛爾  

案件摘要：  
一位客戶委托 Hockrow 事務所對臭名昭著的科學家<EM4>羅根·喬里特博士</EM4>進行全面調查。該客戶認為喬里特博士與聯合科學與開發公司的拉撒路基地事件有關，因此希望對喬里特博士及其研究有更全面的了解。

合約調查員行動：  
獲取進入 ASD 已關閉的<EM4> Onyx 設施</EM4>的權限，喬里特博士曾在該設施擔任首席科學家。抵達後，查找並<EM4>訪問研究實驗室的人員檔案</EM4>，以便我們了解該設施的運作情況。  

附加說明：  
盡管 ASD 已正式關閉該設施，但仍需謹慎行事。不僅實驗室本身可能存在危險，周邊區域近期存在有人造訪的跡象。可能有拾荒者或占領者在現場。

我已為你爭取到員工身份證碼，只要你接受工作，就能訪問那裡的計算機。

此外， Onyx 設施僅有大型機庫可用，因此請合理規劃你的行程。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
The seismic data you extracted had some interesting revelations. My expert says she thinks that Jorrit might have been excavating down there. Hate to think what he’s doing, but it's our job to find out. I think we’re close to cracking this, so I want you to go back to Onyx and gather the Power Usage data. If we can track energy flow from the last couple months, a pattern should reveal itself. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>upload the Power Usage data</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll be sending you <EM4>10 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of the information we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案例檔案 #JD10285
首席調查員：亞肯·馬洛爾

案例更新：
你提取的地震資料揭示了一些有趣的資訊。我的專家說，她認為喬里特可能在那裡進行過挖掘。我不敢想像他到底在做什麼，但找出答案是我們的工作。我覺得我們快要破案了，所以我希望你回到 Onyx 收集電力使用數據。如果我們能追蹤過去幾個月的能量流動，就能發現一些規律。 

合約調查員行動：
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>部門樓並<EM4>上傳電力使用資料</EM4>。 

附加說明：
警戒現場可能存在的敵對勢力。 

乘坐可存放在大型機庫中的車輛前往 Onyx。

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
All your digging around Onyx has paid off. I’ve been able to confirm that Jorrit has been operating an off-the-record lab in the facility’s Site-B in order to conduct an experiment he calls “Project Hyperion.” I’ll send his <EM4>lab notes to your mobiGlas journal</EM4> once you’re underway, but the long and short of it is the bastard is trying to make Humans evolve or some nonsense like that.

The client wants the experimental data, so you’re going back to Onyx and do everything needed to get Project Hyperion up and running. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Prep the experiment by collecting a <EM4>Reagent code from the Engineering wing</EM4> and a <EM4>Catalyst code from the Research wing</EM4>.

Once you have those, head down to the <EM4>Lab in Site-B</EM4> and <EM4>run the experiment</EM4> so you can <EM4>upload the results</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Since this is an active lab, there might be ASD security on-site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案件檔案 #JD10285
首席調查員： 亞肯·馬洛爾

案件更新： 
你在 Onyx 的所有調查都得到了回報。我已經能夠確認喬里特一直在該設施的 B 棟經營一個未經記錄的實驗室，以進行他稱之為「亥珀龍計畫」的實驗。一旦你出發，我就會將他的 <EM4>實驗室筆記發送到你的 MobiGlas 日誌中</EM4>，但簡單來說，這個混蛋試圖讓人們進化或類似進化飛升的各種胡說八道。

客戶想要實驗數據，所以你將返回 Onyx 並做一切需要的事情來讓亥珀龍計畫啟動並運行。

合約調查員行動：
通過從 <EM4>工程區收集一個試劑代碼</EM4> 和從 <EM4>研究區收集一個催化劑代碼</EM4> 來準備實驗。

一旦你有了這些，就前往 <EM4>B 棟的實驗室</EM4> 並 <EM4>運行實驗</EM4>，這樣你就可以 <EM4>上傳結果</EM4>。

額外註記：
由於這是一個活躍的實驗室，現場可能會有 ASD 安全人員。

乘坐可存放在大型機庫的載具前往 Onyx。

- Geist 裝甲胸甲 ASD 版

- 燦爛

- Geist Armor Core ASD Edition

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
Reviewing Dr. Jorrit’s recent files that you uploaded to me left us with more questions than answers. While we know for a fact that the doctor had been inside Onyx, we don’t yet know the specifics of what he was doing. The client is eager for us to learn more about what exactly Jorrit’s up to, so I’m afraid you’re going to have to go back in.

I have a few ideas on how we might be able to use the facility’s systems to pinpoint Dr. Jorrit’s activities, though you’ll have to physically bring me the data this time so we can properly analyze it. First up, are the energy sensors in Engineering. They’re still active and sensitive enough to pick up any anomalous readings.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M1_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案件編號：JD10285  
首席調查員：亞肯·馬洛爾  

案件更新：  
在查看你上傳給我的喬里特博士的近期文件後，我們得到的疑問比答案還多。雖然我們確切知道該博士曾進入過 Onyx 設施，但目前尚不清楚他具體在做什麽。客戶急於讓我們進一步了解喬里特的具體行動，因此恐怕您需要再次進入該設施。

我有個想法，或許你可以利用設施的系統來鎖定喬里特博士的活動軌跡，不過這次你必須親自將數據帶給我，以便我們進行詳細分析。首先是工程部的能量傳感器，它們仍處於活躍狀態，且仍保持有足夠的靈敏度，能夠捕捉到任何異常讀數。

合約調查員行動：  
探索<EM4>工程</EM4>部門，<EM4>獲取能量異常數據</EM4>，並將其送至<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

附加說明：
註意現場可能存在的敵對勢力。

為前往 Onyx 設施，請駕駛可存放在大型機庫的載具。

Seems he’s had more stuff coming into Onyx than going out which is interesting. We’re going to need more intel though. There’s an old experiment running down there that monitors minute seismic changes. If you can deliver that data to me, it’ll help us pinpoint some of the movement around the facility.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M3_Repeat_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
One of the biggest issue when it comes to ongoing investigations is intel growing stale. To help alleviate that, I’m going to have you head back into Onyx and grab the latest seismic sensor data. Would be good to see what the latest readings say.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Seismic data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll send you a <EM4>ASD Secure Drive</EM4> that you can collect at your home location.
Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M3_Repeat_desc.tr:
Hockrow 事務所
案件編號：JD10285

在持續調查過程中，情報過時是最大的問題之一。為了緩解這一問題，我將安排你返回 Onyx 設施，獲取最新的地震傳感器數據。看看最新的讀數結果會對案件進展很有幫助。

探索<EM4>研究</EM4>部門，<EM4>獲取地震數據</EM4>，並將其送至<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- 賞金合約 -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

賞金獵人公會
處理與發佈部門

賞金獵人公會已授權一項官方賞金任務。

姓名：[TARGET] 
星系：[SYSTEM] 
風險評估：高
最後已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知隸屬關係：<無>
備註：隨著您在社群中的地位不斷提升，賞金獵人公會希望能為您提供考取「熟練追蹤者執照」的機會。

此執照將證明您具備追蹤並逮捕高風險目標 (HRT) 的資格。這些罪犯可能會乘坐具有數艘護衛艦的大型多員船艦旅行。額外的攻防能力使他們成為只有公會中最熟練的成員才能應付的棘手目標。

為了成功完成此認證過程，您必須逮捕一名名為 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的 HRT 級別罪犯，其最後出沒於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。


賞金獵人公會
伸張正義

賞金獵人公會是受傭兵公會認可的保全服務機構，並獲授權依據《異星貿易授權法案》在 UEE 境內及境外地區展開行動。

FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Desc_001.en:

FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
Junior-level courier needed for deliveries across the Stanton System.
Transportation must be provided by courier.
You will be <EM4>required to lift up to .25 SCU</EM4> in weight.
Couriers are responsible for the correct handling and safety of all packages charged to their care.

Good luck and good speed, courier!

快遞員負責妥善處理並保障交由其保管的所有包裹的安全。

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01.tr:
紅風物流
「您的貨物，有我保障」
----------------------------   

<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的一個人剛剛聯絡我，說有一堆貨物，<EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>或更小的貨櫃，需要將其運送到到幾個不同的地點。   

送貨地點（任意順序）  
[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]  

我相信你能在這裡規劃自己的路線，所以不要搞砸了。並儘量遠離任何過於危險的地方。

並且不要忘記帶上<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。

'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>32 SCU</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VE_De.en:
I won't bore you with the nitty gritty, but trust me when I say that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is important to the Headhunters. So imagine how pissed I am to learn that they're being harassed by some aggressive upstarts who are hellbent on taking out their <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4>. It won't stand.   

Get there and provide some protection before everything gets destroyed, including <EM4>any friendly ships</EM4> in the area. Nullbrains like these hopefully won't pose too much of a challenge to a rising star like yourself.

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig.

- Stows
HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VE_De.tr:
我不會用那些繁瑣的細節煩你，但當我說 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 對獵頭者很重要時，請相信我。所以想像一下，當我得知他們受到一些咄咄逼人的新秀騷擾，這些人一心想拿下他們的 <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 時，我有多生氣。這絕對不能容忍。

趕到那裡並提供一些保護，免得一切都被摧毀，包括該區域的 <EM4>任何友方飛船</EM4>。希望像你這樣的新星，對付這種無腦傢伙應該不會太困難。

把它們全清理乾淨，我會把 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4> 丟給接受這份工作的任何人。

- Stows

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_VE.en:
You don't need all the details, but Headhunters have an interest in what happens over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and I just got word they're being harassed by some aggressive upstarts. 

The dumb sods are trying to cripple the place by taking out their <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4>. I'm not having it.   

Get there and provide some protection before everything gets destroyed. These chumps are lightweights so shouldn't be too much of a problem for you to handle. 

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig as a bonus.

- Stows
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_VE.tr:
你不需要知道所有的細節，但獵頭者對 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 發生的事情很感興趣，我剛得到消息他們正受到一些咄咄逼人的新秀騷擾。

這些愚蠢的傢伙正試圖透過拿下他們的 <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 來癱瘓這個地方。我絕不允許。

趕到那裡並在一切被摧毀之前提供一些保護。這些傢伙只是無足輕重的小角色，所以你處理起來應該不會太麻煩。

把它們全清理乾淨，我會把 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4> 作為獎金丟給接受這份工作的任何人。

- Stows

headhunters_killship_cfp_hrt_desc_001.en:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to [TARGET], who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around [LOCATION], so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_cfp_hrt_desc_001.tr:
需要再處理一艘 CFP 的船。它屬於 [TARGET]，這個人一直在迫使當地居民，如果他們不接受繁榮公民的幫助，就把他們趕出家園。這個人真的是個麻煩，現在我們已經獲准處理他。

他們的船在 [LOCATION] 附近被發現，所以出發去那裡，完成任務吧。

Stows out。

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_.en:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at [LOCATION], they're getting hit by some geniuses led by [TARGET]. We've tussled against [TARGET] in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but [TARGET] should be your focus.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_.tr:
在找有空的打手處理一個快速的任務。[LOCATION] 正在被一群自以為聰明的人襲擊，領頭的是 [TARGET]。我們之前和 [TARGET] 曾經對抗過，所以他們沒有長進也不意外。

我們希望你能去那裡，解決他們。隨便殺誰，但 [TARGET] 是你的主要目標。

Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001.en:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. There’s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out they’re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk they’re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

We’ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they don’t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Can’t say for certain, but odds are they won’t give a pro like you too many problems.  

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001.tr:
有些人為了點錢什麼都幹得出來。<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 那邊有一群新興的不法之徒竟然開始製造毒品。結果證明他們不太擅長，或者可能太擅長了。他們生產的劣質毒品比一般的毒品更強效，對任何使用的人來說都是真正的危險。

我們受僱去搗毀他們的製毒工廠，並摧毀現場儲藏的所有毒品。有武裝警衛保護這個地方，但他們看起來不太專業。我們的監視團隊觀察到其中一人差點射到自己的腳。雖然不能完全確定，但你這樣的專業人士應該不會遇到太多麻煩。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

headhunters_sabotage_generators_multi_M_.en:
Got a few scavs that have rooted themselves into [LOCATION]. We have our own plans there and need the place cleared out. 

That's why I want you to ho and turn off their power. Let's see if that doesn't cause these rats to abandon the place for good.

-Stows
headhunters_sabotage_generators_multi_M_.tr:
有一些 scav 已經紮根於[LOCATION]。我們在那裡有自己的計劃，需要清理這個地方。

這就是為什麼我要你去切斷他們的電源。讓我們看看這是否能讓這些老鼠永遠離開這個地方。

Stows out。

Got a few scavs that have rooted themselves into [LOCATION]. We have our own plans there and need the place cleared out. 

That's why I want you to ho and turn off their power. Let's see if that doesn't cause these rats to abandon the place for good.

-Stows

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
嗨，我是艾拉。

急需一名運輸員來接一項工作。我們的一位承包商遇到「個人緊急情況」不得不棄船，看來他們是不會回來了。說真的，這情況不太理想。

好消息是，根據追蹤器的顯示，貨物仍然完好無損。如果您能前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 取得貨物並將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯來完成這項工作，那對我來說將是一次巨大的勝利。

這似乎是一次相當大的運送任務，您需要一艘能運輸 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦，以及一具用來移動所有東西的 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。非常感謝您的幫助。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·提耶諾
初級物流協調員
柯瓦雷克斯航運
「任何您需要的，送到您需要的任何地方。」







柯瓦雷克斯航運是一家有限責任公司。為了鼓勵及時交貨並防止貨運欺詐，柯瓦雷克斯航運將設置交貨時限，一旦到期，任何未交付的貨物都將被視為失竊並據此處理。總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。

headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
Sending a call out to anyone nearby. Got a pretty heavy work order for one of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Sounds like we need <EM4>six fuses</EM4> fixed. You'll also need a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC to patch up about five pipes</EM4> to stop the place from falling apart.

If you bring all the shit needed to patch them up, we'll pay you out.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.tr:
向附近任何人發出呼叫。我們在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的一個前哨站有一份相當繁重的工作訂單。聽起來我們需要修理<EM4>六個保險絲</EM4>。你還需要一個<EM4>回收工具</EM4>和<EM4>足夠的RMC來修補大約五根管道</EM4>，以防止這個地方崩塌。

如果你帶齊所有修補所需的東西，我們會付你錢。

希望你知道自己在做什麼，但以防萬一，你mobiGlas日誌裡的<EM4>「維護指南」</EM4>或許值得一看。

Stows 完畢。

headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001.en:
Down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, the place got utterly smashed in a storm and needs some serious patchwork.

If anyone out there has a <EM4>bunch of fuses</EM4> (I hear <EM4>six</EM4> should be plenty), a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC cans to deal with eight or so messed up pipes</EM4>, we'll hook you up with some creds to do the fix.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.
headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001.tr:
在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，這個地方在暴風雨中完全被摧毀了，需要一些嚴重的修補。

如果有人有<EM4>一堆保險絲</EM4>（我聽說<EM4>六個</EM4>就夠了）、一個<EM4>回收工具</EM4>，以及<EM4>足夠的RMC罐來處理大約八根損壞的管道</EM4>，我們會付你一些信用點來進行維修。

希望你知道自己在做什麼，但以防萬一，你mobiGlas日誌裡的<EM4>「維護指南」</EM4>或許值得一看。

Stows 完畢。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. They’ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it won’t matter once you deal with them.

We’ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. The spot is ideal for an ambush because of the <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s a perfect place to power down and hide until you’re ready to strike. If you’re available, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc.tr:
埃克哈特保全有限責任公司
合約與派遣

合約類型：船艦伏擊
批准碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

立即處理

需要有人幹掉一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>並處理保護它的護航船艦。他們已經干擾了我們數個正在進行的行動，並在埃克哈特保全的多個案件中成為一個真正的問題。不確定他們的最終目的是什麼，但一旦你處理掉他們，這也就不重要了。

我們已放出風聲，說我們將在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>執行一項任務，這應該能作為誘餌引他們出來。該地點非常適合伏擊，因為那裡的<EM4>輻射雲</EM4>是關閉動力並隱藏起來直到你準備好出擊的絕佳地點。如果你有空，<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>及其護航隊應該很快就會經過。

付款將在合約成功完成後發放。主承包商還將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎金。

此合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權及/或私人資訊。此資訊僅供上述指定個人或實體使用。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
<EM4>EckhartSecurityShipAmbushEasy</EM4>

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Party_Tim.en:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Party_Tim.tr:
嗨，

<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的人好像在計畫一個派對，需要幫忙及時採購所有東西。這次你需要去多個地方取貨，包括去倪克絲拿一些 Jynx 琴酒。不確定你喝過沒有，但那是倪克絲的特產。有些人受不了它會發出粉紅色的光，但我很喜歡。它有種真正獨特的後勁。

以下是取貨地點：

取貨地點（順序不拘）

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

請記得帶上<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>，因為你將處理高達 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4> 的貨櫃。


祝運輸愉快，
Reyes Ling
貨運物流協調員
Ling 家族運輸







Ling 家族運輸知道宇宙是危險且不可預測的，並已建立多項協議來保護您和我們客戶的貨物。為確保您不會因無法控制的情況而受到懲罰，總付款將按成功交付的貨物百分比進行按比例分配。每次運輸將設定一個交付計時器。任何在計時器到期時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為失竊並依此處理。所有取貨和交付必須自動裝載或在貨運電梯進行。

Hi, 
 
Normally Reyes schedules our hauls, but she’s gone for the day, and I just got a comm inquiring about a simple, direct run from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. The cargo is a load of fruit that will lose its value if it spoils. We don't want to anger this client, so would appreciate it if you knocked this out in a timely manner.  

Here’s some other details you should know. The largest container used is <EM4>2 SCU</EM4>, so don’t forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. 

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

通常 Reyes 會安排我們的運輸，但她今天不在，我剛接到一通詢問，關於從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的一趟簡單直接的運輸。貨物是一批水果，如果變質了就會失去價值。我們不想惹惱這位客戶，所以如果您能及時完成，我們將不勝感激。

這裡還有一些您應該知道的細節。使用的最大貨櫃是 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>，所以別忘了您的<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。

Petra Ling
貨運營運董事總經理

LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.en:
Hey, 
 
Any chance you’d be willing to do a haul into Pyro? I know it can get dangerous there but this is for a good cause. A group of new CFP members have moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and had a tough time adjusting to life in the system. They all left stuff behind in Stanton, because their transporter didn’t have room, so we’ve been hired to pick it all up and bring it to them.      

Here are the pick ups:   

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]
- [LOCATION 4] 

CFP leaders hope that bringing them this stuff will make the system feel more like home. Let’s make sure this one goes down smoothly. Remember to equip your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit <EM4>2 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

嘿，
 
有機會願意跑一趟派羅嗎？我知道那裡可能很危險，但這是為了個好理由。一群新的 CFP 成員搬到了 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>，適應星系生活遇到了一些困難。他們都在史丹頓留下了東西，因為他們的運輸船沒有空間，所以我們被雇來把所有東西撿起來，帶給他們。

以下是取貨地點：

取貨地點（順序不拘）

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

祝運輸愉快，
Reyes Ling
