CFP_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.en:
Outlaws have been increasing their activity along one of the more popular routes in the system and we’re hoping to provide a deterrent before the problem gets out of hand. As such, we’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and deal with any hostiles you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>8 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.tr:
法外之徒在星系中一條較受歡迎的航線上的活動日益頻繁，我們希望在問題失控前提供嚇阻。因此，我們希望你駕駛一艘備戰船艦前往那裡，處理你可能遇到的任何敵對分子。

一旦你接受了這份合約，就前往你抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>，並掃描沿途的航點。在所有航點都確保安全後，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎勵。


莉瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民會

CFP_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
After weeks of seeing crime rates increase, we’ve been able to identify a sector that we believe to be the source of the outlaw activity that has been leeching into the surrounding areas. While it would be too much to expect to eradicate all threats, we believe that by sending combat patrols into the area we might be able to start reversing this worrisome trend. Our in-house combat analysts recommend bringing around <EM4>three wingmen</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>24 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.tr:
在犯罪率持續數週上升後，我們已能確定一個我們認為是法外之徒活動源頭的區域，這些活動已滲透到周邊地區。雖然期望根除所有威脅可能過高，但我們相信，透過派遣戰鬥巡邏隊進入該區，我們或許能開始扭轉這個令人擔憂的趨勢。我們的內部戰鬥分析師建議帶上約<EM4>三名僚機</EM4>，駕駛備戰船艦，以應對你可能遇到的任何敵對勢力。

一旦你接受了這份合約，就前往你抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>，並掃描沿途的航點。在所有航點都確保安全後，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎勵。


莉瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民會

CFP_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.en:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been plagued by outlaw attacks recently and hopefully, with your help, we can change that. We’d suggest <EM4>bringing some backup</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>14 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.tr:
我們已確定一個最近飽受法外之徒攻擊的區域，希望在你的幫助下，我們能改變這種狀況。我們建議<EM4>帶些後援</EM4>，駕駛備戰船艦，以應對你可能遇到的任何敵對勢力。

一旦你接受了這份合約，就前往你抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>，並掃描沿途的航點。在所有航點都確保安全後，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎勵。


莉瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民會

CFP_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.en:
We’ve noted an increase in traffic along one of the travel lanes we monitor. Chances are that we won’t be the only ones paying attention. I’d like you to head out there in a combat-ready ship and make sure there are no outlaws attempting to take advantage of this sense of security.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>4 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.tr:
我們注意到我們監控的一條航道交通量有所增加。很可能我們不會是唯一注意到這點的人。我希望你駕駛一艘備戰船艦前往那裡，確保沒有法外之徒試圖利用這種安全感。

一旦你接受了這份合約，就前往你抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>，並掃描沿途的航點。在所有航點都確保安全後，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎勵。


莉瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民會

InterSec_SecurityPatrol_VH_desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been tracking increased outlaw activity in certain sectors of the system. This activity in conjunction with other intelligence leads us to believe that outlaws are planning an attack on elements traveling from the UEE. We're aiming to patrol these sectors and disrupt any plans before they can be put into action.

Currently, we need someone who can help patrol a highly dangerous sector. Once you've accepted the mission, you can proceed to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there, we'll send you along a specific route with additional waypoints to scan. Complete the patrol and we'll send the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Due to the high probability of attack and general threat level of local outlaws, we recommend <EM4>recruiting trusted wingmen</EM4> to provide combat support.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
InterSec_SecurityPatrol_VH_desc_001.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：法外之徒
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦
簡報：InterSec 一直在追蹤星系某些區域法外之徒活動的增加。此活動結合其他情報，使我們相信法外之徒正計畫攻擊來自 UEE 的人員。我們的目標是巡邏這些區域，並在他們的計畫付諸實施前予以瓦解。

目前，我們需要有人協助巡邏一個高度危險的區域。一旦您接受任務，即可前往抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>。從那裡，我們將引導您沿著特定路線前進，並提供額外的航點供您掃描。完成巡邏後，我們將向主要承包商發放 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip 的獎金。</EM4>

由於遭受攻擊的可能性很高，且當地法外之徒的威脅等級普遍較高，我們建議<EM4>招募可信賴的僚機</EM4>提供戰鬥支援。

此致，

Deacon Tobin
營運經理

CFP_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.en:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>2 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.tr:
我們需要有戰鬥經驗的人為我們巡邏一條航道。多年來，我們發現走出去讓自己被看見是件好事。有時候，像你這樣的飛行員經過一個區域就足以嚇阻任何潛在的法外之徒。但萬一你遇到一些比較有野心的，建議使用一艘準備好戰鬥的船。

一旦你接受了這份合約，就前往你抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>地點標記</EM4>。在你掃描完所有航點並確保路線安全後，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎勵。


莉瑪·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民會

InterSec_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: There's a growing concern that Vanduul hunting parties are pushing further into Nyx. The first line of defense against this encroachment is increased patrols. InterSec has identified a sector that has seen an uptick in Vanduul activity and are looking for someone to patrol the region and provide an update on it.

You'll begin your patrol at a <EM4>location marker</EM4> sent to your HUD and then scan a series of waypoints along a designated route. The Vanduul ships in this sector are highly skilled and aggressive, so InterSec highly recommends that you <EM4>bring several combat-ready ships along as backup</EM4>.

InterSec understands the immense danger you'll be under on this patrol, so we'll send a special bonus of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor once the sector is clear.      

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

您將從抬頭顯示器上的<EM4>位置標記</EM4>開始巡邏，然後掃描指定路線上的一系列航點。該區域的 Vanduul 船艦技術高超且具攻擊性，因此 InterSec 強烈建議您<EM4>攜帶數艘戰備船艦作為後援</EM4>。

InterSec 理解您在這次巡邏中將面臨巨大危險，因此一旦該區域安全，我們將向主要承包商發放 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip 的特別獎金。</EM4>

cfp_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.en:
It seems one of the routes that we had thought relatively safe has proven otherwise. Outlaws have attacked one of our pilots over at [LOCATION] and they won't make it much longer without support. 

I'd appreciate it if you could fly there as quickly as possible and help them deal with these attackers.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.tr:
我們搞錯了一件事，不法之徒在我們原本以為相對安全的 [LOCATION] 襲擊了我們正在航線上的一位飛行員，如果沒有支援，他們撐不了多久的。

如果你能盡快飛往該處並協助他們應對這些襲擊者，我將不勝感激。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員

Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHar.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Vanduul 
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships 
Briefing: We've just lost contact with a pilot who engaged with Vanduul forces at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Travel to their last known location and if they're still alive, defend them long enough to ensure they can escape. Ensuring the safety of the operative is crucial, as is eliminating any Vanduul threats to the UEE.

You'll most likely need a <EM4>strong group of ships</EM4> to successfully neutralize these Vanduul.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

前往他們最後已知的地點，如果他們還活著，保護他們直到確保他們能逃脫。確保特工的安全至關重要，消除對 UEE 的任何 Vanduul 威脅也是如此。

你極可能需要<EM4>強大的船艦隊伍</EM4>才能成功殲滅這些 Vanduul 人。

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Defector_d.en:
This shit saddens me. Not sure if you've ever crossed paths with [TARGET] in your dealings with us. Thought they were a real good one. Been with the Headhunters for years, but something must have happened because they went running to CFP for protection. Sold out some of our brothers and sisters along the way.

All the Judges are furious and wants blood. That's where you come in. Go to [LOCATION], find [TARGET], and kill them.

Doesn't have to be anything fancy. Just want the result.

Damn shame.

Stows out.
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Defector_d.tr:
這件事讓我很難過。不確定你是否曾經與 [TARGET] 有過交情。我曾經以為他是個真正的人才。加入獵頭幫多年，但看來有些事情發生了，他跑去向 CFP 求保護，過程中還出賣了一些我們的兄弟姐妹。

所有的老大都很生氣，想要血債血還。這就是你該出手的時候。去 [LOCATION]，找到 [TARGET]，把他們解決掉。

不需要什麼花哨的手法，只要結果。

真是可惜。

Stows out。

Hockrow_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP50122
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us potentially prevent a death. An informant has reported an active hit issued for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and fears the worst, but the client has hired us like us to look into it. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Last known location was <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head over there and see if the person mentioned by our client is still with us. If they’re not, examine the body closely so we can report back to them with details of their death.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.
Hockrow_searchbody_space_E_Desc_001.tr:
霍克羅事務所
案件檔案 #MP50122
首席調查員：亞肯·馬洛

案件摘要：
需要一名特工幫助我們可能阻止一起死亡事件。一名線人報告稱，已對<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>下達了暗殺令，並擔心最壞的情況發生，但客戶已僱用我們這樣的機構進行調查。

合約調查員行動：
最後已知位置是<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。去那裡看看我們客戶提到的人是否還健在。如果他們不在了，請仔細檢查屍體，以便我們能向他們回報死亡詳情。

額外註記：
此合約已標記為<EM4>可能發生戰鬥</EM4>，請做好相應準備。

Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_NonHostiles_de.en:
Got a line on a bounty named <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Someone spotted them along with known criminal accomplices at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need you to get there before they get going. 

<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has a reputation for only showing their face in places with civs. Really need you to take down this bounty without there being any civilian collateral damage. Foxwell can’t afford to be caught in the shitstorm that would erupt over the loss of innocent life. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateSpecific_NonHostiles_de.tr:
掌握到一個名為 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的懸賞目標線索，有人在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 發現他們和已知的犯罪同夥在一起，需要你趕在他們離開之前抵達。

據聞 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 素以僅在有平民出沒之處現身聞名。務必請你在沒有任何平民附帶損害的情況下完成此懸賞任務。Foxwell 無法承擔因無辜生命損失而引發的軒然大波。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Hard_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec requires a skilled contractor to eliminate a highly dangerous group of criminals based in Nyx who are planning a coordinated strike on a prominent member of the UEE Navy.

We have intercepted a crucial piece of intelligence suggesting a known terrorist by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> intends to carry out this assassination along with the help of local criminal elements.

They are currently located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, making this an ideal time for us to strike. Be warned, these outlaws are experienced killers - bringing a <EM4>group of trustworthy allies</EM4> is advised.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.
Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Hard_001.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：亡命之徒
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦
簡報：InterSec 需要一名技術嫻熟的承包商來消滅一個位於倪克絲的高度危險犯罪集團，他們正計劃對 UEE 海軍的一名重要成員發動協同打擊。

我們截獲了一份關鍵情報，顯示一名名為 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 的已知恐怖份子打算在當地犯罪分子的幫助下執行這次暗殺。

他們目前位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，這是我們發動打擊的理想時機。請注意，這些亡命之徒是經驗豐富的殺手 - 建議帶上<EM4>一群值得信賴的盟友</EM4>。

敬上，

Deacon Tobin 
營運經理 
InterSec 防禦解決方案  

本通訊包含非約束性要約，一旦接受，任何一方均可立即終止而無需任何通知。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔個人風險，並須在適用情況下遵守星系法律。

bhg_bounty_desc_FPS_intro.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: This preliminary bounty is being offered to you as a formal evaluation of your skills. Successful completion of this contract will lead to additional bounty work being made available. 

It is believed that the target will be on foot and well armed, so be prepared to engage in a firefight. Additionally, there may be other hostiles forces at the site, while they should not be your primary focus, you may have to engage with them while in pursuit of the target.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

headhunters_killship_cfp_vhrt_desc_001.en:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. [TARGET] is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although [TARGET] might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around [LOCATION], so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_cfp_vhrt_desc_001.tr:
有個鉑金級目標需要處理。[TARGET] 是個大人物，負責保護繁榮公民的安全。雖然 [TARGET] 可能已經忘記了，但獵頭幫還記得他幾年前與一個傭兵公司合作，導致五個兄弟姐妹的死亡。我們要以血還血。

他們最近出現過在 [LOCATION] 附近，你應該還能在那裡找到他。

他是個狠角色，帶上你的夥伴，但一定要確保他死於非命。

Stows out。

northrock_bounty_prisoner_desc_intro.en:
Hey There,

My name is Braden Corchado and I'm a logistics officer for Northrock Service Group, the leading independently-owned security firm operating in the Stanton system. I may have reached out already, but we try to make it a point of approaching anyone who meets our high standards and encouraging them to complete a pro tem contract. 

You can't do much better than become a Northrock contractor. We have a solid reputation for offering challenging and interesting work at a higher rate of pay then many of our competitors in system. 

Now, to get approved, you will need to apprehend one [TARGET]. They have recently escaped from the detention center and your job will be to track them down before they can disappear completely off the grid. 

A little hint is that it's safe to assume that the target is going to go try to clear their record. I recommend triangulating your search between the detention center they escaped from and locations where they can hack into the record system.

Get this done and we'll see about getting you more work.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_prisoner_desc_intro.tr:
你好，我叫 Braden Corchado，北境之磐服務團隊的後勤官，史丹頓星系內最大的獨立保全公司。我可能已經找過你了，但我們希望能聯繫上每個達到高標準的人，並去完成我們的臨時合約。

成為北境之磐的承包商絕對是你的不二之選。我們良好的聲譽能為你提供一些既有趣又不乏挑戰性的工作，且報酬高於星系內的其它競爭者。

如果，你想獲得認證的話，你需要去抓捕 [TARGET]。他們最近剛從拘留中心裡逃出來，而你的工作就是在他們消聲滅跡前，把他們抓回去。

有些線索能幫得上忙，可以假設他們此時應該趕著要去清除記錄，我建議你在拘留中心的位置，和他們有機會能駭入記錄系統的地方進行下三角定位。

搞定這事我再看看能不能安排給你更多的事。

希望盡快收到你的答覆，

Braden Corchado
後勤官 - 史丹頓分部
北境之磐服務團隊

TheCollector_Ships_MISC_Prospector_Desc.en: Wikelo loves rocks. Wants to help you get more better rocks. Made this Prospector more better for that tough job. Trade items and you can have.
TheCollector_Ships_MISC_Prospector_Desc.tr: Wikelo 喜歡石頭。想要幫你弄到更多更好的石頭。把這艘勘探者 (Prospector) 變得更適合那種艱難的工作。交換物品你就可以擁有。

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_001.en:
We’ve learned that XenoThreat is about to launch an attack on [LOCATION]. If they are successful, the number of casualties is expected to be high. I’m hoping that with your aid in defending them, we can make sure that doesn’t happen.
 
We know from past encounters that XenoThreat sends several raiding parties to carry out their attacks, so make sure you don’t leave the outpost until you’ve fought off all the reinforcements. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_001.tr:
我們得知外禍威脅即將對[LOCATION]發動攻擊。如果他們成功，可能會造成大量傷亡。我希望你能來協助防守，這樣我們就可以確保這種情況不會發生。

根據以往的遭遇，我們知道外禍威脅會派遣幾個突擊隊進行攻擊，所以在你確定擊退所有增援之前，請不要離開前哨站。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_003.en:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is mobilizing for a massive incursion to wipe [LOCATION] off the map. You’re their only hope of enduring this assault and protecting them from XenoThreat’s cruelty.

I know I’m asking you to put yourself in the line of fire, but this system won’t change unless people like you are brave enough to take on these dangers. No amount of credits could measure up to how much good you’d be doing by stepping in.

If you’re willing and able to take on this mission, make sure to take some allies with you. XenoThreat will certainly send in stronger reinforcements once they realize they’re taking losses.

We believe in you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_003.tr:
緊急情況！

外禍威脅正在準備大規模入侵，企圖將[LOCATION]從地圖上抹去。你是他們唯一的希望，擋下這次攻擊，保護他們免受外禍威脅的殘害。

我知道我是在要求你把自己置身險境，但只有像你這樣面對危險能挺身而出的人，才能改變這個星系。再多的錢也抵不上你的壯舉帶來的益處。

如果你願意並有能力執行這項任務，一定要帶上一些盟友。如果外禍威脅發現自己損失慘重，他們肯定會派出更強大的援軍。

我們相信你。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_002.en:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is targeting [LOCATION] to send a message to other settlers about what happens if they accept our support. 

If you’re able to fend off the attackers, I’m sure they’ll send additional forces, so you’ll need to dig in for multiple assaults. Since XenoThreat has a lot of resources at their disposal, you should think about recruiting others to help you keep everyone safe.

We’re all counting on you.

Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend-xenothreat_desc_002.tr:
緊急情況！

外禍威脅打算威脅[LOCATION]的定居者，因為他們支持我們。

即使你能擊退他們，他們應該也還會派出更多的部隊，所以你需要防禦多次攻擊。外禍威脅擁有大量資源，你應該考慮招募盟友來幫助你保護大家的安全。

我們都指望著你。

Lima Endicott

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_.en:
Some morons with some seriously inflated notion of their place in 'verse made the damn foolish choice of attacking the <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We've got some things in play over there so we can’t let ‘em get away with it.

If you're interesting in helpin' out, get there and deal with these luggers before they can do too much damage. Don't figure you'll break too much of a sweat dealin' with them.

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_.tr:
一些對自己在宇宙中的地位過度膨脹的蠢蛋，竟然愚蠢地襲擊了位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的 <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4>。我們在那裡有一些佈局，所以不能讓他們得逞。

如果你有興趣幫忙，去那裡解決這些混蛋，別讓他們造成太大的破壞。對付他們應該不會讓你費太多力氣。

另外，為了表示感謝，我會給主要承包商額外的 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4> 來增加吸引力。

Stows 完畢。

EckhartSecurity_Defend_M_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve gotten word that outlaws have their sights set on attacking <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Our client is concerned the attack is imminent and requested that security be deployed to the site immediately. If you’re interested and available, gather all the supplies and support you may need and head to the location pronto.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Defend_M_Desc_001.tr:
"Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：測驗 - 保衛據點
授權代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

我們收到消息，有不法份子正準備針對 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 發動襲擊。我們的客戶擔心這次襲擊已迫在眉睫，因此要求立即部署保全前往現場。如果您有興趣且時間允許，請備妥所有您需要的補給品和支援，並立即前往該地點。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

本合約不開放任何議價與協商。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。"

Headhunters_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001.en:
Some idiots with a deathwish are attacking our ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Can’t let ‘em do that without paying the price. Want to do the honors?

If so, head out and get after ‘em. The crew there is tracking the attacker’s movements and I’ll pass along situational updates as they come in. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001.tr:
Some idiots with a deathwish are attacking our ships around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Can’t let ‘em do that without paying the price. Want to do the honors?

If so, head out and get after ‘em. The crew there is tracking the attacker’s movements and I’ll pass along situational updates as they come in. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor a bonus of <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.

Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Hard_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: One of our pilots is under attack at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and is in need of assistance.

This operative is carrying key information regarding a coordinated attack on key UEE infrastructure and it is vital that they are able to deliver it to us. You and any <EM4>dependable pilots you can recruit</EM4> are charged with protecting them from the outlaws in pursuit long enough for them to QT away.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Hard_001.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系 
敵對勢力：不法之徒
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦
簡報：我們的一名飛行員在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭受攻擊並需要協助。

該特工攜帶有關針對 UEE 關鍵基礎設施之協同攻擊的關鍵情報，至關重要的是他們必須能將其交付給我們。你與任何<EM4>你能招募到的可靠飛行員</EM4>的任務是保護他們免受追擊的不法之徒傷害，直到他們能進行量子跳躍離開。

敬上， 

Deacon Tobin 
營運經理 
InterSec 防禦解決方案 

本通訊包含僅供收件人使用的機密資訊。若為誤收，請忽略並通知發件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔個人風險，並須遵守 UEE 及適用之星系法律。

cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_XT_M_desc_001.en:
XenoThreat forces launched an unprovoked attack near [LOCATION]. We're looking for any available combat operators to go and provide support. 

If you haven't dealt with them before, it's important to know that XenoThreat are trained fighters so this will not be an easy fight, but it's a necessary one.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

外禍威脅的部隊在 [LOCATION] 附近發起了無理攻擊。我們現在需要任何可用的戰鬥人員前來提供支援。

如果你以前沒有與他們交手過，請知道外禍威脅是經過訓練的戰鬥員，這將不是一場容易的戰鬥，但這是必要的。

祝你好運，

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

cfp_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_desc_001.en:
Reports indicate that [LOCATION] has come under attack from a group of armed individuals led by a notorious outlaw named [TARGET]. There have been multiple reported deaths and injuries, so Citizens for Prosperity has been looking for qualified combat operatives to provide some support. 

Though we don't advocate conflict resolution through violence, we believe that the group will disperse if [TARGET] is not there to lead them.

Head over as soon as you can. Lives are on the line.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_EliminateSpecific_Generic_E_desc_001.tr:
據報告指出，<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 正在遭受一個由惡名昭彰的亡命之徒<EM4>「[TARGET]」</EM4>所帶領的武裝組織的襲擊。目前已有多起死亡和受傷報告，因此「繁榮公民」組織正在尋找合格的戰鬥人員提供支援。

儘管我們不主張透過暴力解決衝突，但我們相信如果 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 不在場領導他們，這個團體就會自行解散。

人命關天，請盡快前往目的地。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

I’m in need of a highly competent pilot who can gather a crew of equally capable pilots for an escort mission. The mining base at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is currently under attack from a group of outlaws and the crew there is unable to leave without assistance. Our scouts have reported that the attackers are armed with exceptional weaponry and ships.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_E_Des.en:
I was having a shite day, and it just got worse. Our interests over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> comm'd to let me know that their  <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> are under attack by these no-name hoods looking to stake a claim.

You're gonna go there for me and protect the place, including any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4> unfortunate enough to be caught in the crossfire. Don't think putting these wannabees in their place will be too tricky for someone like you. 

Also, I’ll sweeten the pot by giving the main contractor <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> just to show my appreciation. 

Stows out.
HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_E_Des.tr:
我今天本來就很倒楣，結果現在更糟了。我們在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的利益相關者聯絡我，說他們的 <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 正受到這些不知名混混的襲擊，想來佔地盤。

你要去那裡幫我保護這個地方，包括任何不幸被捲入交火的 <EM4>友方飛船</EM4>。我認為把這些想出頭的傢伙按在地上摩擦，對你這樣的人來說應該不會太難。

另外，為了表示感謝，我會給主要承包商額外的 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4> 來增加吸引力。

Stows 完畢。

TheCollector_Ships_Prowler_Util_Desc.en: Wikelo work hard. You work hard. Prowler Utility work hard. But you bring me right items, I make it work more hard, then you work less hard. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Prowler_Util_Desc.tr: 威克洛很努力。你很努力。潛行者多功能型也很努力。但你把對的東西帶來給我，我讓它更努力，然後你就可以少努力一點。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_Pulse_Desc.en: Wikelo really like this little Human ship. Pulse feel very fast. Can have many configuration to make Pulse go faster. If you want, can give you configurated Pulse that I like. Have list of what I want for job. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Pulse_Desc.tr: Wikelo 非常喜歡這艘小型人類飛船。脈衝感覺很快。可以進行多種配置來提高脈衝的速度。如果你需要，我可以給你一些我喜歡的配置脈衝。我列出了一些我需要的工作清單。再見。

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has asked us to infiltrate an old ASD research site and wipe the contents of a few specific servers there.

We believe the servers are located somewhere within the <EM4>Xenotech Lab, in the Research wing</EM4>. The client has also informed us that despite the facilities being publicly declared as closed, you're still likely to find hostile forces there.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.tr:
Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：銷毀伺服器
授權代碼：VS-14

需要立即處理

一位客戶要求我們潛入一個舊的 ASD 研究站，並清除那裡幾台特定伺服器的內容。

我們相信這些伺服器位於<EM4>研究大樓的異星科技實驗室</EM4>內。客戶還告知我們，儘管該設施已公開宣布關閉，但你仍然有可能在那裡遇到敵對勢力。

成功完成合約後將發放報酬。

本合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權及/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。

headhunters_sabotage_servers_VH_XT_desc_.en:
I'm so mad right now I can barely see straight. A Headhunter who I thought I could trust just went over to the XenoThreat. Yeah, aliens killed your family. Shit sucks, but you don't turn your back on your people. 

To add insult to injury, the bastard gave XenoThreat a bunch of our intel. I have some other folks tracking the traitor down, but I need you to take care of wiping out the stolen data for me. It's being kept on servers at [LOCATION].

-Stows out
headhunters_sabotage_servers_VH_XT_desc_.tr:
我現在非常生氣，幾乎看不清楚一切。我以為可以信任的獵頭幫人剛剛去了外禍威脅。是的，外禍威脅殺害了你的家人。雖然情況很糟糕，但你不會背棄你的人民。 

更糟的是，這個混蛋把我們的大量情報給了外禍威脅。我派了其他人去追捕叛徒，但我需要你幫我清除被盜的資料。資料被保存在[LOCATION] 的伺服器上。

Stows out。

I'm so mad right now I can barely see straight. A Headhunter who I thought I could trust just went over to the XenoThreat. Yeah, aliens killed your family. Shit sucks, but you don't turn your back on your people. 

To add insult to injury, the bastard gave XenoThreat a bunch of our intel. I have some other folks tracking the traitor down, but I need you to take care of wiping out the stolen data for me. It's being kept on servers at [LOCATION].

-Stows out

vaughn_searchbody_space_VE_Desc_001.en:
Despite having given the client my word that their target has been dealt with, they are disposed to bouts of paranoia, so they require additional digital evidence of their demise.

I’ll need you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and give the corpse a thorough once over. Whilst I’m confident <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is taken care of, verification via your mobiGlas will hopefully bring some peace of mind to my client.

I can’t imagine you coming across any significant trouble, but in this line of work, some trouble is always to be expected.

Sincerely,

Vaughn
vaughn_searchbody_space_VE_Desc_001.tr:
儘管我已經向客戶保證他們的目標已被處理，但他們很容易有多疑症發作，因此需要額外的數位證據來證明目標的死亡。

我需要你前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 並對屍體進行徹底的檢查。雖然我有信心 <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> 已經被解決了，但透過你的 mobiGlas 進行驗證希望能給我的客戶帶來一些安心。

我想你不會遇到什麼大麻煩，但在這一行，遇到一些麻煩總是在預料之中的。

誠摯的，

沃恩

shubin_rockcracker_solo_desc_01.en:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
shubin_rockcracker_solo_desc_01.tr:
合約：採礦權轉讓
地點：倪克絲星系

詳細資訊：
舒賓星際的探勘者最近在基格小行星帶附近發現了一座廢棄的 QV 行星服務破岩站的位置。這些站點最初由這家已倒閉的公司用來從礦物小行星內部開採寶貴的資源，但它們確切位置的相關紀錄早已在歲月中遺失。

雖然這個特定的太空站目前處於離線狀態，但我們的偵察小組認為，只要進行必要的維修，它就能重新運作。此外，如果它重新上線，那裡已經有一顆富含資源的小行星，隨時可以被太空站的採礦雷射給擊碎。

不幸的是，由於在倪克絲星系運作會面臨各種挑戰，舒賓星際目前沒有足夠的能力親自處理上述的維修工作。然而，這也為像您這樣有興趣的獨立採礦團隊創造了機會。

<EM4>條款*：</EM4>
我們將釋出這座 QV 破岩站的<EM4>獨家採礦權</EM4>。購買後，我們將「僅」向您與您的船員提供該太空站的座標。您的團隊之後將可以駕駛<EM4>採礦船</EM4>前往那裡，將<EM4>太空站的採礦雷射</EM4>恢復至可運作狀態，擊碎小行星並<EM4>採收內部的資源</EM4>。

請注意，雖然我們保證這些座標對您是獨家的，但我們無法保證其他有興趣的團體（例如不法分子）不會自行發現太空站的位置。建議您務必保持謹慎。

*接受本合約即表示您承擔與此處所述工作相關的所有風險，舒賓星際對合約期間所造成的任何損害概不負責。

- R97 "正義" 霰彈槍

shubin_rockcracker_pvp_desc_01.en:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS: 
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>shared mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to you and your crew. (Remember, any other interested parties who purchase the mining rights will get access to the station as well.) Your crew will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that since this is a shared contract we are able to offer these mining rights at a reduced prices, but the resources in the asteroid will be available on a <EM4>first come, first serve</EM4> basis with any other mining crews at the site. Also, there is also a chance that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
shubin_rockcracker_pvp_desc_01.tr:
合約：採礦權轉讓
地點：倪克絲星系

詳細資訊：
舒賓星際的探勘者最近在基格小行星帶附近發現了一座廢棄的 QV 行星服務破岩站的位置。這些站點最初由這家已倒閉的公司用來從礦物小行星內部開採寶貴的資源，但它們確切位置的相關紀錄早已在歲月中遺失。

雖然這個特定的太空站目前處於離線狀態，但我們的偵察小組認為，只要進行必要的維修，它就能重新運作。此外，如果它重新上線，那裡已經有一顆富含資源的小行星，隨時可以被太空站的採礦雷射給擊碎。

不幸的是，由於在倪克絲星系運作會面臨各種挑戰，舒賓星際目前沒有足夠的能力親自處理上述的維修工作。然而，這也為像您這樣有興趣的獨立採礦團隊創造了機會。

<EM4>條款*：</EM4>
我們將釋出這座 QV 破岩站的<EM4>共享採礦權</EM4>。購買後，我們將向您與您的船員提供該太空站的座標。（請注意，其他購買採礦權的利益相關者也將獲得該太空站的存取權。）您的團隊之後將可以駕駛<EM4>採礦船</EM4>前往那裡，將<EM4>太空站的採礦雷射</EM4>恢復至可運作狀態，擊碎小行星並<EM4>採收內部的資源</EM4>。

請注意，由於這是一份共享合約，我們能以較低的價格提供這些採礦權，但小行星內的資源將依據<EM4>先到先得</EM4>的原則與現場的其他採礦團隊競爭。此外，其他有興趣的團體（例如不法分子）也有可能自行發現太空站的位置。建議您務必保持謹慎。

*接受本合約即表示您承擔與此處所述工作相關的所有風險，舒賓星際對合約期間所造成的任何損害概不負責。

headhunters_defendship_multi_VHRT_PA_des.en:
One of our Clips is in a tight spot. Just got a comm from ‘em saying their convoy is being swarmed by the People’s Alliance and they need help on the double. Well, they said it in a more colorful way than that. All I’ll say is that I don’t want to hear what they’ll say to me if they don’t survive and are forced to regen. 

Situation must be serious if this Clip is freaking out. Really need you to get to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> immediately, and ensure that they make it out alive.

Stows out.
headhunters_defendship_multi_VHRT_PA_des.tr:
我們的一位「快船」成員正處於困境。剛接到他的通訊，說他的護航隊被人民聯盟包圍了，急需支援。嗯，他說得比這更粗俗。我只能說，如果他們沒能活下來，被迫重生，我可不想聽他們會對我說什麼。

如果這位「快船」成員都嚇壞了，情況一定很嚴重。真的需要你立即前往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，確保他們能活著出來。

史托斯，通話完畢。

TheCollector_Ships_ARGO_Raft_Desc.en: RAFT is very useful. Wikelo take it and make it very very useful. Do work and make you happy. You want? Bring items to Wikelo for trade.
TheCollector_Ships_ARGO_Raft_Desc.tr: RAFT 非常有用。Wikelo 拿走它，讓它變得非常非常有用。做工並且讓你開心。你想要嗎？帶物品來給 Wikelo 交換。

cfp_eliminateall_hh_E_desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for security personnel to take a former CFP outpost that's currently serving as a hideout for Headhunters to launch attacks throughout the system. 

Located near [LOCATION], reclaiming this outpost will allow CFP to provide greater support to local efforts to build stability.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_eliminateall_hh_E_desc_001.tr:
「繁榮公民」正在尋找安全人員來奪回一個曾經的「繁榮公民」前哨基地，該基地目前被「獵頭幫」佔據，並作為他們發動攻擊的藏匿所。

該基地位於 [LOCATION] 附近，重新奪回這個基地將使「繁榮公民」能夠為當地的穩定建設提供更多支持。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

cfp_eliminateall_XT_E_desc_001.en:
Despite our efforts to promote non-violence, local outlaw groups continue to attack our organization. XenoThreat recently assaulted [LOCATION] and chased out our volunteers that had been working there.

We're looking to enlist combat personnel to retake the outpost. Ideally we could work something out to encourage them to move on, but XenoThreat quickly resorts to violence to solve all their issues so there will undoubtedly be a fight.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_eliminateall_XT_E_desc_001.tr:
儘管我們努力推廣非暴力，當地的不法分子仍繼續襲擊我們的組織。外禍威脅最近襲擊了 [LOCATION]，並驅逐了正在那裡工作的志願者。

我們正在尋找戰鬥人員來重新奪回這個前哨基地。理想情況下，我們希望能夠達成某種協議來促使他們撤離，但外禍威脅總是迅速訴諸暴力來解決所有問題，因此這場戰鬥是不可避免的。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

We're looking to enlist combat personnel to retake the outpost. Ideally we could work something out to encourage them to move on, but XenoThreat quickly resorts to violence to solve all their issues so there will undoubtedly be a fight.

Lima Endicott

cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_VH.en:
Citizens for Prosperity's board just authorized funds to hire security personnel to retake several clusters near [LOCATION] that have since fallen into the hands of the Headhunters. While we tried to just accept the loss, it's become apparent that they are crucial to our ongoing operations in the system.

You'll need to clear out each of the locations that will be provided but more importantly, you'll also need to take out [TARGET], who's in charge of the hostiles on site.

These Headhunters are heavily embedded and have a history of violence, so you should prepare accordingly. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_VH.tr:
繁榮公民的董事會剛剛批准資金，聘請安全人員奪回位於 [LOCATION] 附近的多個區域，這些區域目前已落入獵頭幫之手。雖然我們曾試圖接受這些損失，但現在已經明顯這些地點對我們在該星系的持續運營至關重要。

你需要清除提供給你的所有目標地點，但更重要的是，你必須擊殺現場敵對勢力的指揮官 [TARGET]。

這些獵頭幫成員盤踞已久，且有著暴力的歷史，因此你應該做好充分準備。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織


Citizens for Prosperity's board just authorized funds to hire security personnel to retake several clusters near [LOCATION] that have since fallen into the hands of the Headhunters. While we tried to just accept the loss, it's become apparent that they are crucial to our ongoing operations in the system.

You'll need to clear out each of the locations that will be provided but more importantly, you'll also need to take out [TARGET], who's in charge of the hostiles on site.

These Headhunters are heavily embedded and have a history of violence, so you should prepare accordingly. 

Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_H_.en:
Looking for any available security personnel to reclaim several clusters previously lost to XenoThreat aggressors. Located near [LOCATION], they had been seized in brutal attacks led by [TARGET], a notorious XenoThreat lieutenant.

We're looking to take these clusters back so we can reestablish operations and continue our good work. You'll need to clear all the hostiles still on-site as well as [TARGET].

Just a reminder, that XenoThreat are highly trained and quick to fight, so prepare accordingly.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_H_.tr:
尋找任何可行動的安全人員，以奪回先前遭到外禍威脅攻擊者奪取的多個區域。這些區域位於 [LOCATION] 附近，曾在臭名昭著的外禍威脅中尉 [TARGET]所主導的殘暴攻擊中被占領。

我們希望奪回這些區域，以重新建立作業並繼續我們的重要工作。 你需要清除所有仍在現場的敵對勢力，以及 [TARGET]。

提醒你，外禍威脅訓練有素且戰鬥反應迅速，請做好相應準備。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織


Looking for any available security personnel to reclaim several clusters previously lost to XenoThreat aggressors. Located near [LOCATION], they had been seized in brutal attacks led by [TARGET], a notorious XenoThreat lieutenant.

We're looking to take these clusters back so we can reestablish operations and continue our good work. You'll need to clear all the hostiles still on-site as well as [TARGET].

Just a reminder, that XenoThreat are highly trained and quick to fight, so prepare accordingly.

Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity

InterSec_ResourceGathering_Cryopods_Desc.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: <EM4>Cargo Capable Ship</EM4>, Personal Arms, <EM4>Heavy-Duty Tractor Beam</EM4>
Briefing: 
Our latest intel shows that the Shattered Blade have replenished their stock of Vanduul corpses and will shortly be transferring them from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4>they're operating from to an interested buyer. The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
InterSec_ResourceGathering_Cryopods_Desc.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：法外之徒出沒並持有武裝
裝備規格：<EM4>具備貨艙的船艦</EM4>、個人武器、<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>
簡報：
我們最新的情報顯示，「碎刃幫」已經補充了他們的 Vanduul 屍體庫存，並將很快將它們從他們營運的舊 <EM4>QV 後勤站</EM4> 轉移給感興趣的買家。UEE 不能讓 ASD 事件重演，所以他們急切希望我們能<EM4>回收這些冷凍艙</EM4>，並將它們運送到<EM4>位於 [DESTINATION] 的貨運電梯</EM4>。

雖然在場的「碎刃幫」成員可能會抵抗，但他們不是你任務的重點。視需要處理他們，並取回冷凍艙。

此致，

Deacon Tobin
營運經理
InterSec 防禦解決方案

此通訊包含機密資訊，僅供指定收件人使用。如錯誤接收，請忽略並通知寄件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，且必須在適用情況下遵守 UEE 及星系法律。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- Pulse 雷射手槍
- Testudo 臂甲 撼地
- Testudo 胸甲 撼地
- Testudo 腿甲 撼地
- Testudo 頭盔 撼地
- Pulse 雷射手槍電池 (容量60)
- Testudo 背包 撼地

- Testudo Core Earthshake
- Testudo Legs Earthshake
- Testudo Helmet Earthshake
- Pulse Laser Pistol Battery (60 Cap)
- Testudo Backpack Earthshake

InterSec_ResourceGathering_Tech_Desc.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: 
To prevent the Shattered Blade from flooding the black market with xeno-contraband, the UEE has charged InterSec with <EM4>recovering a stash of Vanduul Plating and Metal.</EM4> from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4> the gang has been occupying. Once you have the materials in your posession, deliver them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Following from your previous experience, it would not be surprising if the Shattered Blade offer resistance, but ensure that your focus is on recovering the materials.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
InterSec_ResourceGathering_Tech_Desc.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：法外之徒出沒並持有武裝
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦、個人武器
簡報：
為防止「碎刃幫」將外星違禁品充斥黑市，UEE 已指派 InterSec 從該幫派佔領的舊 <EM4>QV 後勤站</EM4> <EM4>回收一批 Vanduul 裝甲板和金屬</EM4>。一旦你取得這些材料，請將它們運送到位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。

根據你過去的經驗，「碎刃幫」很可能會進行抵抗，但請確保你的重點是回收材料。

此致，

Deacon Tobin
營運經理
InterSec 防禦解決方案

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
嘿，

這次任務我只尋找最頂尖的承包商。我們的一位極具價值的客戶正在等待一批非常重要的貨物，但現在已經嚴重逾期。

在柯瓦雷克斯，我們自豪地對所有客戶一視同仁，無論運送什麼，都能提供出色的服務水準。話雖如此，如果我們丟失了這份合約，某人將會惹上大麻煩，而我真的不希望那個人是我。

追蹤器回報上一位承包商的船艦位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。這次任務請不要冒險，您需要一艘能容納 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦和一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 來收集全部貨物。

將貨物送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯，我們就可以把這場混亂拋諸腦後。而且您在這個過程中將賺到一大筆信用幣。還不錯，對吧？

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·提耶諾
初級物流協調員
柯瓦雷克斯航運
「任何您需要的，送到您需要的任何地方。」







柯瓦雷克斯航運是一家有限責任公司。為了鼓勵及時交貨並防止貨運欺詐，柯瓦雷克斯航運將設置交貨時限，一旦到期，任何未交付的貨物都將被視為失竊並據此處理。總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。

CFP_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
A Citizens for Prosperity ship has been ambushed by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we need a skilled pilot to help them out.

We lost contact with them mid comms, but it sounded like they were taking heavy fire. It may be too late for them, but the vital supplies they were carrying could still be put to good use. Fly over there, take out any hostiles, and recover the shipment. You'll need a ship that can support <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the supplies onto your ship.

Take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll guarantee they'll be put to good use.

Be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.tr:
一艘「繁榮公民」的船艦在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭到了不法分子的伏擊，我們需要一名熟練的飛行員來協助他們。

我們在通訊中斷前失去了聯繫，但聽起來他們受到了猛烈的攻擊。對他們來說可能太遲了，但他們運送的重要物資仍然可以發揮巨大作用。飛到那裡，消滅任何敵對目標，並找回貨物。您需要一艘能夠支援 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦，以及一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 來將物資運上您的船艦。

將它們帶到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯，我保證它們會被妥善利用。

出門在外注意安全，

莉瑪·安迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ApolloSkin.en: Apollo very good ship. Would be much better if ship was red. Wikelo make all things possible. You trade for what I want and we have a deal.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ApolloSkin.tr: 阿波羅是艘好飛船。如果飛船是紅色的話會更好。Wikelo 能讓一切皆有可能。你拿我想要的東西來換，我們就成交。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_RedHunterArmor.en: Wikelo hear that Humans think red is the color of passion and anger. This armor good for both. You give me items on list and this red armor is yours.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_RedHunterArmor.tr: Wikelo 聽說人類認為紅色是激情和憤怒的顏色。這套護甲兩者都很適合。你把清單上的物品給我，這套紅色護甲就是你的了。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_GMNI_Shotgun.en: Shooting can be messy. Red Human Blood everywhere. Not a problem with this shotgun. Splashes blends right in! I give it to you if you give me everything I want on list. Good trade.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_GMNI_Shotgun.tr: 射擊有時會弄得很髒亂。到處都是紅色的人類血液。有了這把霰彈槍就不成問題了。濺出的血跡會完美地融合在一起！如果你把我清單上所有想要的東西都給我，我就把它給你。划算的交易。

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.en:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.tr:
福克斯威爾從一位重要客戶那裡得到消息，法外狂徒組成了一個小隊，他們正駕駛著次級主力艦和護航戰鬥機在星系中潛行。我們的客戶擔心，如果不加以控制，法外狂徒會組建更多這樣的攻擊小隊，並破壞星系安全。我們受僱在這種情況發生之前消滅這個團體。

我們需要一位自信且技術嫻熟的承包商來完成這項任務。好消息是我們已經制定了計劃。這個小隊使用的一艘船，一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，是從我們的客戶那裡偷來的，他們仍然能夠追蹤其動向。他們與我們分享了位置數據，我們發現這個小隊經常出沒於<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。我們已經偵察過該地點，發現一片大型星雲是理想的伏擊地點。

老實說，這並不容易。我們沒有任何額外的部隊可以部署，所以最好帶上您自己的支援。

如果原承包商能成功完成此事，我已安排了 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 傭兵公會代幣</EM4>的額外獎勵。

祝您好運，

凱文·沃爾頓
派遣員，福克斯威爾執法
「您的安全，由您做主」

福克斯威爾執法是一家在UEE全境獲得許可的擔保安全專家。我們一直在尋找新的操作員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人有興趣，請聯繫我們的合約代表。

Foxwell_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_01.en:
Something weird is going on at the old Hathor mining facilities. Both the platform alignment facilities and orbital laser platforms have been abandoned and gathering dust for decades, but outlaws have started using them as a base of operations.

We’ve been hired by a concerned party who’s recently lost a lot of important cargo to one such gang. Currently, their stuff is stashed at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>, but there’s a growing fear that the gang may be offloading their goods soon. That’s why we’ve been hired to hit both of those Hathor facilities, retrieve the cargo from the freight elevators, and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Here’s the specifics on what to grab from each location. Doesn’t matter in what order you do this, as long as it all gets collected and delivered. Just be sure to bring a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

Foxwell hasn’t been able to scout these locations, but if I were you, I’d expect to face some serious armed resistance. Best bring a bunch of gear and some friends.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_01.tr:
在舊哈索爾礦業設施發生了一些奇怪的事情。平台校準設施和軌道雷射平台都已經廢棄數十年，佈滿灰塵，但現在卻有法外狂徒開始將它們當作行動基地。

我們受一位憂心忡忡的人士委託，他最近有一批重要的貨物被其中一個幫派劫走了。目前，他們的贓物藏匿在 <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> 和 <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>，但它越來越擔心該幫派很快就會將貨物脫手。因此我們受僱前往這兩個哈索爾設施，從貨運升降機中取回貨物，並將其運送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運升降機。

以下是每個地點需要取得的具體物品。完成順序並不重要，只要所有東西都被收集並運送即可。請務必攜帶一艘能夠裝載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的飛船。

隨身攜帶一把<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>也沒什麼壞處。

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

Foxwell 未能偵察這些地點，但如果我是你，我猜大概會遇到嚴重的武裝抵抗。最好帶上充足的裝備和一些朋友。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

Foxwell_bombingrun_S_desc_001.en:
We are looking for a highly competent mercenary team to assist with a challenging demolition for a VIP client.

The outlaws operating at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been identified as a threat of growing concern in the area and to help deal with this situation your team is being tasked with taking out the fuel tanks at the location. 

However, it won't be as easy as just slipping in and out - expect to deal with multiple hostiles and turrets that will be expecting you. The stronger your crew the better your chances at completing this operation successfully.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

我們正在尋找一支高度勝任的傭兵團隊，協助一位 VIP 客戶進行一項具挑戰性的破壞任務。

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 營運的不法分子已被確認為該地區日益令人擔憂的威脅，為了解決這個問題，您的團隊受命摧毀該地點的燃料槽。

然而，這不會像溜進去再溜出來那麼容易——預期會遇到多名等著您的敵軍和砲塔。您的團隊越強大，成功完成此行動的機會就越大。

祝您好運，

Foxwell_bombingrun_VH_desc_001.en:
Foxwell have been hired by a client to take part in a multi-stage operation on a known outlaw base at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and need a strong pilot to play their part in this.

You, and whatever additional support ships you arrange, will be tasked with taking out the fuel tanks located there to set the stage for the rest of the operation to follow. 

Unfortunately, this place is swarming with ships and anti-air turrets. So make sure you and your people are ready, and remember, the fuel tanks are your priority. No need to be a hero.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

不幸的是，這個地方擠滿了船艦和防空砲塔。所以請確保您和您的人員準備就緒，並且記住，燃料槽是您的優先目標。不需要逞英雄。

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.en:
A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

一位客戶需要我們的幫助。法外狂徒在他們做生意的某些區域遊蕩，並攻擊他們遇到的任何人。我們的客戶已經損失了幾艘船隻，再也承受不起任何損失了。

我們需要有人巡邏這些區域，並引出任何敵對勢力。任務一開始，你需要前往 HUD 上<EM4>標示的地點</EM4>進行掃描。。然後我們會分享一些其他的巡邏點供您掃描。

聽起來，這些船隻編隊的飛行員技術嫻熟且具侵略性。如果您遇到他們中的任何一個，最好準備好戰鬥。最好<EM4>至少有兩位值得相信的飛行員</EM4>陪在你身邊

在成功完成巡邏後，原承包商將獲得 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 傭兵公會代幣</EM4>的額外獎勵。

保持冷靜，

派遣員，福克斯威爾執法
「您的安全，由您做主」

福克斯威爾執法是一家在UEE全境獲得許可的擔保安全專家。我們一直在尋找新的操作員加入我們的大家庭。如果您或您認識的任何人有興趣，請聯繫我們的合約代表。


A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_desc_01.en:
A crew recently raided a distribution center and made off with <EM4>[CARGOGRADETOKEN] load of cargo</EM4>. Foxwell has been hired to get all those goods back. We’re getting reports of these outlaws using old Hathor facilities as stash houses and we believe the stolen items are currently at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

If interested, you’ll need a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. Doubt you’ll be able to slip in and out of that PAF without being noticed either, so best be prepared to clear the location. Once safe, grab the goods from the freight elevator and deliver them to the <EM4>freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_desc_01.tr:

如果有興趣，你需要一艘能夠裝載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的飛船。

隨身攜帶一把<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>也沒什麼壞處。我懷疑你無法在不被注意的情況下進出那個平台校準設施，所以最好準備好肅清該地點。確保安全後，從貨運升降機中取得貨物，並將其運送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運升降機。

Marcus Clenn

Ship support is needed at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> immediately. Our client’s interests in the area are under fierce attack by outlaw forces. Looking for someone who can grab their gear, a few support ships they can trust, and deploy before it’s too late. Once you arrive, I’ll send any sitrep updates your way.  

Don’t mess this up. These clients are paying for and expecting top tier protection. If anything goes wrong, we could lose this contract. That’s why we’ll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>8 MG Scrip</EM4> if all goes down without a hitch.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
Need a battle-hardened pilot for an important patrol. A prominent client is fed up with outlaws targeting their ships and satellites. We’ve been hired to scan the areas in question and deal with any hostile forces. The patrol begins at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD before moving to a number of other locations we’ll expect you to clear.

Not sure what you’ll run into out there, but based on intel shared by the client, they’re frequently seeing fighter groups of five to seven ships roaming the region. Some even have larger ships leading the charge. That means you better be ready for a serious fight. If you can, try to recruit at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> to the cause. Even a seasoned pilot will need all the help they can get against this crew.   

Since this is going to be a tough one, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> at the end of the patrol.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the [TARGET] is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the [TARGET] is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_VH_Des.en: Urgent ship support needed at [LOCATION]. A known destructive criminal organization has been testing the waters with one of our clients’ property for months, and has now raised hell by targeting the client’s [OBJECTS]. These assets are highly valuable, so need to keep those safe at all costs – though we know it’ll be no easy feat. I cannot stress enough how dangerous these guys are, so I wouldn’t hesitate to bring backup to deal with them. If you and the assets make it out intact, we’re offering a well-earned 7 MG Scrip to the main contractor. Best of luck, Kevin Walton Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement 'Security, Your Way' Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_S_Desc.en: An emergency contract just came through about a gang of violent thugs wreaking havoc on one of our VIP clients’ infrastructures. If available, we need you to rush to [LOCATION] and defend the client’s extremely valuable [OBJECTS] at all costs. Foxwell is extremely aware of this group, so believe me when I say these pilots are not to be taken lightly. I strongly recommend that you arrange a highly competent backup force to fly with you to the site. If you manage to survive the encounter with the client’s property intact, we’re adding 9 MG Scrip any main contractor brave enough to take this job on. Stay safe, and good luck, Kevin Walton Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement 'Security, Your Way' Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. RedWind_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

我們在完成一項運輸任務時遇到了困難，需要一位在危險環境中有工作經驗的可靠承包商來完成這項工作。先提醒一下，貨物位於一艘被多個極度危險的不法之徒包圍的廢棄船隻中。我們強烈建議你帶上一些後援和<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>來取回客戶的貨物。詳情如下：

回收地點
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

送貨地點
     · 位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯

由於這有點風險，我們提供相應的報酬。我將讓你決定如何將其分配給你的船員。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸。請勿故意做任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Putting out a call for a highly skilled pilot who can recover our client’s cargo. Please only accept this contract if you have experience dealing with extremely hostile situations involving multiple combatants. Additional crew members and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are highly recommended.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The cargo should be in the bay of the abandoned ship. The client has already expressed frustration regarding the cargo’s delay so please work quickly and efficiently.

BE RESILIENT – Life is hard and sometimes you have to roll with the punches. Keep going and don’t let it bring you down.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

現正招募一位技術高超的飛行員來回收我們客戶的貨物。除非你有處理涉及多個戰鬥人員的極度敵對情況的經驗，否則請不要接受此合約。強烈建議攜帶額外的船員和一把<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

回收地點
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

送貨地點
     · 位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯

貨物應該在廢棄船隻的貨艙裡。客戶已經對貨物的延誤表示沮喪，所以請迅速有效地工作。

保持韌性——生活是艱難的，有時你必須逆來順受。繼續前進，不要讓它擊垮你。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

One of our haulers ran into some engine trouble whilst transporting some cargo for us and was forced to abandon their ship. Looking for a contractor who can recover the cargo and complete the delivery. You’ll need to bring your own <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the cargo to your ship. Details below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Be advised, the recovery location hasn’t been verified as safe. You might find an opportunistic outlaw trying to take the cargo for themselves, so be on alert.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

我們的一位運輸人員在為我們運送貨物時遇到了一些引擎故障，被迫棄船。正在尋找能夠回收貨物並完成運送的承包商。你需要帶上你自己的<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>將貨物搬運到你的船上。詳情如下。

回收地點
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

送貨地點
     · 位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯

請注意，回收地點尚未確認是否安全。你可能會發現投機取巧的不法之徒試圖將貨物據為己有，所以請保持警惕。

以你的工作為榮——即使作為承包商，你也代表著紅風運輸。請勿故意做任何損害公司聲譽的事情。

RedWind_HaulCargo_desc_intro.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_desc_intro.tr:
紅風物流
「您的貨物，有我保障」
----------------------------

紅風物流正在尋求加強我們在派羅的運輸商名單。需要一個能夠保持機智並且保持安靜的人。 如果你檢查了這些箱子，並且有一艘可以處理 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]</EM4>貨櫃的船，可以嘗試這個試運送單。  

取貨
貨運電梯位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 

送達
貨運電梯位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

<EM4>完成此合約後，我們將為您提供更多的運輸機會。</EM4>

別忘了帶上<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。


RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers in Pyro. It takes a special pilot to want to do runs in a system as unpredictable as this one. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way.

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We have a special assignment for only the most competent contractors. One of our haulers who is sadly no longer with us failed to complete their last job. The cargo they were supposed to deliver is sitting stationary in their former ship in the location listed below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

I’m not going dance around the issue, this is an extremely challenging job. You’ll need to bring a strong team of skilled pilots with you to deal with the outlaws that killed the previous contractor and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s cargo. That said, if you take on this contract, we will make it worth your time.

HOW DID WE DO – Complete our short feedback survey on our Spectrum page for a chance to enter our monthly prize draw.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

我們有一項僅針對最有能力的承包商的特別指派。我們的一位運輸人員——遺憾的是他已不在人世——未能完成他們最後的工作。他們原本應該運送的貨物正靜止在位於下列地點的前座駕中。

回收地點
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

送貨地點
     · 位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯

我不打算拐彎抹角，這是一項極具挑戰性的工作。你需要帶領一支由技術嫻熟的飛行員組成的強大團隊來對付那些殺死了前一位承包商的不法之徒，並帶上一把<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>來取回客戶的貨物。也就是說，如果你接下這份合約，我們會讓這一切物超所值。

我們做得如何——在我們的頻譜頁面上完成簡短的反饋調查，即有機會參加我們的每月抽獎。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A Red Wind hauler has been ambushed by some outlaws and now our clients’ cargo is sitting still whilst they prepare to steal it. We need a pilot with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a combat ready ship to head to the location below and recover the cargo before it’s gone for good.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The pilot reported multiple hostiles so make sure you take this seriously. 

EVERY OPPORTUNITY COUNTS – Make the most of what’s given to you, show us that you can handle more work.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

一艘紅風運輸船遭到了一些不法之徒的伏擊，現在我們客戶的貨物正靜靜地待在那裡，而他們準備偷走它。我們需要一位擁有<EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>和備戰船隻的飛行員前往下列地點，在貨物永遠消失之前將其回收。

回收地點
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

送貨地點
     · 位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯

飛行員報告有多個敵對目標，所以請確保你認真對待此事。

每一個機會都至關重要——充分利用給予你的機會，向我們展示你可以處理更多的工作。

cfp_bombingrun_sabotage_generators_desc_.en:
There is a group of outlaws at [LOCATION] that have become increasingly brazen in their attacks on Citizens for Prosperity assets in the system. 

To minimize loss of life, we want to first try convincing them to move on to somewhere else by disabling their generators and destroying their fuel reserves. 

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_bombingrun_sabotage_generators_desc_.tr:
在 [LOCATION] 有一群亡命之徒，他們對繁榮公民在星系中的資產發動攻擊，越來越變得膽大妄為。

為了盡量減少生命損失，我們希望先嘗試說服他們撤離，方法是關閉他們的發電機並摧毀他們的燃料儲備。

希望這樣足以讓他們轉而前往更有利的地方。

謝謝。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Highpoint_KillAnimal_OneType_desc.en:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
Highpoint_KillAnimal_OneType_desc.tr:
我們一直在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 監控關於過去幾個月<EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> 族群數量增加的情況。我們的模型顯示，如果這種情況持續下去，許多原生植物和動物將會受到負面影響。在那之前，務必降低 <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> 的種群數量。

有關目標動物的進一步細節，請參考您日誌中的 <EM4>《史丹頓野生動物指南》</EM4>。

敬上

Wanda Werkheiser
合約經理
高點荒野專家

Highpoint_KillAnimals_rockcracker_desc_E.en:
If you have any work that's going to be bringing you to one of those old QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, we have something else that we could use your help on while you're there.
 
We've recently been contacted by the People's Alliance to assist with an initiative to help prepare these abandoned stations for repairs. Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.
 
Reduce the Valakkar numbers at any of the old QV Breaker Stations and we will offer you payment.
 
Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
Highpoint_KillAnimals_rockcracker_desc_E.tr:
如果您有任何工作會將您帶到基格小行星帶 (Keeger Belt) 的那些舊 QV 破岩站，我們還有其他事情可以在您那裡時需要您的幫助。
 
人民聯盟最近聯繫了我們，以協助一項為維修這些廢棄站點做準備的倡議。不幸的是，瓦拉卡蠕蟲的侵擾正在為空間站的基礎設施，以及它們有朝一日重啟的機會造成嚴重問題。由於瓦拉卡蠕蟲屬於外來入侵物種，我們已決定撲殺牠們是唯一可行的選擇。
 
減少任何舊 QV 破岩站的瓦拉卡蠕蟲數量，我們將為您提供報酬。
 
祝好，
 
汪達·韋克海瑟
合約經理
高點荒野專家

UWC_Refueling_easy_desc_001.en:
Hey there,

If you're fitted for refueling, you might like this one. 

A beacon has just gone live at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, from a client whose <EM4>[SHIP]</EM4> is running on empty, so make sure your fuel pods are topped off.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of <EM4>[FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen</EM4> and  <EM4>[QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum </EM4>, and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

Looks like a zero-drama one and done, but it never hurts to keep your scanners live.
Let me know if you're interested and let's get these good people on their way.

Waiting to hear from you,

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"
UWC_Refueling_easy_desc_001.tr:
嘿，那裡，

如果你配備了加油設備，你可能會喜歡這個。

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 剛啟動了一個信標，來自一位 <EM4>[SHIP]</EM4> 油箱見底的客戶，所以確保你的燃料莢艙已加滿。

客戶飛船將以 <EM4>[FUELRATE] aUEC 每 SCU 氫燃料</EM4> 和 <EM4>[QTFUELRATE] aUEC 每 SCU 量子燃料</EM4> 的費率向你支付費用，而且作為聯合旅人俱樂部承包商，你完成後還將有資格獲得上面列出的 UWC 服務費。

看起來是個沒有戲劇性事件、一次搞定的任務，但保持你的掃描器處於活動狀態總沒壞處。
如果你有興趣請讓我知道，我們讓這些好人繼續上路。

等你的消息，

Dina Deloit
調度中心
聯合旅人俱樂部
「我們是你的後盾」
