CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_M_.en:
It feels that whenever we start to make real progress in the system, the outlaws are there to push one step back. We had recently cleared out [LOCATION] only to learn that a new outlaw gang has taken root there, using it as a launching point for various criminal enterprises. 

Since we can't afford to let this rot spread, you and a few support ships are being charged with heading there to clear out all the gang's packs. After you deal with one pack, be sure to wait until all of the hostile packs have been dealt with.

Know that you are helping to make a real difference,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_M_.tr:
感覺每當我們在星系中取得實質進展時，不法分子就會把我們逼退一步。我們最近才剛清理了 [LOCATION]，卻得知一個新的不法幫派已在那裡紮根，並將其用作各種犯罪活動的發射點。

由於我們承受不起讓這種腐敗蔓延，您和幾艘支援船艦受命前往那裡清除幫派的所有小隊。在您處理完一個小隊後，請務必等待直到所有的敵軍小隊都被解決。

請知道您正在幫助創造實質的改變，
莉瑪·安迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

EckhartSecurity_Defend_H_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

There’s a serious problem brewing for one of our clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’ve been warned that a highly skilled outlaw crew has their sights set on overrunning and occupying that location. We’ve been hired to make sure that doesn’t happen. 

Need a contractor to deploy to the location immediately. Based on the intel provided by the client, this won’t be a walk in the park. We strongly advise you to bring allies and plenty of supplies to help ward of the impending attack.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Defend_H_Desc_001.tr:
"Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：測驗 - 保衛據點
授權代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

我們的客戶在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 正面臨一個嚴重的問題。他們收到警告，一個技術高超的法外狂徒團夥正計劃佔領並掌控該地點。我們受僱來確保不會發生這種情況。

我們需要一位承包商立即部署到該地點。根據客戶提供的情報，這將不是一件輕鬆的任務。我們強烈建議您帶上盟友及充足的補給品，以協助抵禦即將到來的攻擊。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

本合約不開放任何議價與協商。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。"

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.en:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.tr:
最近有一隊船隻伏擊了我們的一支運輸隊，我敢打賭他們會再試一次。正在尋找能在這件事發生之前發動報復性攻擊的人。

我們已經確認那些白痴由幾艘大型船隻和相當規模的護航艦組成。我們認為領頭的是一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，並已將該船設定為主要目標。由於這是一支規模龐大且具侵略性的隊伍，突襲似乎是明智之舉。他們經常經過<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，那裡有一片星雲可以隱藏。聰明點，耐心點，然後在時機成熟時發動攻擊。

除非你自認為是真正的王牌，否則最好帶上一些朋友。或許你可以告訴他們，事成之後他們可以從殘骸中撿拾值錢的東西來吸引他們。

除此之外，我還會給原承包商額外 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 理事會代幣</EM4>，讓這筆交易更誘人。

Stows out. 。


A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

headhunters_eliminateall_outpost_desc_01.en:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from [LOCATION]. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_outpost_desc_01.tr:
一些混蛋拒絕支付我們應得的報酬，重點是這些智障還到處炫耀。要是他們閉嘴的話我們至少還能更乾脆俐落的解決這問題，但看來我們有必要給他們個下馬威了。

這群智障人正在[LOCATION]那裡。我們需要他們全部升天，動靜最好是越大越好，等你把所有人都處理乾淨，我們就會把你的報酬發過去。

- Stows

EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_shut_.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to [LOCATION] and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_shut_.tr:
Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：肅清地點
授權代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

收到聯合科學發展部門的緊急請求，要求所有可行動人員前往 [LOCATION] 處理佔領其一處設施的敵對份子。

抵達現場後，你需要與任何敵對份子交戰並將其消滅。聯合科學發展部門已表明此設施提供前往其一處嵌入式研究中心的接駁服務，但明確表示你無權前往該處。入侵者將被射殺，你也不例外，所以請堅守指定的行動區域。

此合約不得協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特許及/或私人資訊。此資訊僅供上述指定個人或實體使用。

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.en:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.tr:
嗨，

如果您有興趣，這裡有個相對直截了當的任務給您。

我們的一名飛行員忽略了維修警告，果然，幾個小時後他們的船艦在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 拋錨了。他們正在回辦公室的路上，但我們需要一名擁有足以運輸 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 船艦的可靠運輸員來幫我們完成這趟運輸。

覺得您能幫我們這個忙嗎？您只需提取擱淺的貨物，並將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。我可能不需要多說，但帶上一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 可能會很方便。

謝謝，
雷耶斯·林
貨運物流協調員
林氏運輸







林氏運輸深知宇宙充滿危險且難以預料，並制定了數項協議來保護您和我們客戶的貨物。為確保您不會因無法控制的情況而受到懲罰，總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。每次運輸都會設定交貨計時器。任何在到期時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為失竊並據此處理。所有提取和運送必須自動裝載或在貨運電梯進行。

cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.en:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if they’re not responding then they definitely need the help.

We’ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.tr:
一支正在進行補給任務的繁榮公民組織護航隊在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近發出了求救信標。他們沒有回應任何通訊，所以我猜情況很嚴重。那支護航隊有一些技術嫻熟的飛行員，所以如果他們沒有回應，那他們肯定需要幫助。

我們將會補償你支援該護航隊的費用。

利馬·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民組織

Headhunters_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.en:
Our crew at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>9 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow
Headhunters_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.tr:
Our crew at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow

cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_H_.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near [LOCATION] from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by [TARGET] and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that [TARGET] tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_H_.tr:
繁榮公民組織正在尋找任何可行動的安全人員來從獵頭幫手中奪回 [LOCATION] 附近的幾個前 CFP 設施。 這些地點被 [TARGET] 暴力地從我們手中奪走，並導​​致許多志願者死亡。

將這些前哨站重新置於我們的控制之下將有助於為星系提供更多的穩定性。 報告顯示 [TARGET] 傾向於隱藏在他們的隊伍後面，因此一旦你清除了大多數敵人，他們可能就會出現。

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
「繁榮公民」組織


Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near [LOCATION] from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by [TARGET] and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that [TARGET] tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- Karna "硫磺" 步槍
- Artimex 胸甲 磁石
- Artimex 臂甲 磁石
- Artimex 腿甲 磁石
- Artimex 頭盔 磁石
- Karna 步槍電池 (容量35)


<EM4>Potential Blueprints</EM4>
- Karna "Brimstone" Rifle

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.en:
You got a ship and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>? Good. I’ve got work for you.

Don’t know how they knew we were coming, but one of my haulers got jumped over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The pilot’s gone silent so I assume they’ve been ghosted, but the cargo tracker is stationary for now.

Expect the bastards who took out my pilot to still be around, so bring backup. Get the cargo and get out, don’t need to risk anymore good haulers on this mess.

Get the goods to the freight elevator to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll send your payment.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.tr:
你有船和<EM4>一把重型牽引光束</EM4>嗎？很好。我有工作給你。

不知道他們怎麼知道我們要來的，但我的一個運輸員在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>被伏擊了。飛行員失聯了，所以我猜他們被幹掉了，但貨物追蹤器目前還沒動。

那些幹掉我飛行員的混蛋很可能還在附近，所以帶上後援。拿到貨物就快走，我不想再為這爛攤子犧牲更多的好運輸員了。

把貨物送到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯，我會付你錢。

-圖奇

Kaboos_Mission_Description.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters haven’t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. We’ll be in touch.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Kaboos_Mission_Description.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：法外之徒出沒並持有武裝
裝備規格：戰鬥級船艦、個人武器
簡報：InterSec 再次需要您的服務。

您先前收集的情報對於識別非法取得的 Vanduul 零件的幾位主要買家非常有價值。然而，自那時起，「碎刃幫」仍在繼續他們的行動，UEE 要求我們<EM4>更新我們的情報。</EM4>

我們相信可以從位於舊 <EM4>QV 後勤站</EM4>的儲存設施中獲取更多資訊。

行動參數與您上次的任務相同：找到<EM4>加密資料</EM4>並使用<EM4>解密金鑰</EM4>來解密並將清單上傳給我們。「碎刃幫」自上次以來肯定已經加強了該地區的防禦，所以預計會有抵抗。

祝您好運。我們會保持聯繫。


此致，

Deacon Tobin
營運經理
InterSec 防禦解決方案

此通訊包含機密資訊，僅供指定收件人使用。如錯誤接收，請忽略並通知寄件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔風險，且必須在適用情況下遵守 UEE 及星系法律。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToPyro_Dange.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToPyro_Dange.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

如果我們能搞定這單，這可能會成為一條利潤豐厚的常規路線。這趟任務會帶你進入派羅，所以你必須準備好與當地人周旋。

你需要從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 取貨，跳躍到派羅，然後抵達 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

你需要做的就是帶上一艘有空間容納 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>的船，一把<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>，並且準備好在有人找碴時予以反擊。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_FromPyro_Dan.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_FromPyro_Dan.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

有些公司一聽到要在派羅跑一趟就只看到危險。我們看到的是利潤。這裡有一單生意，起點位於星系內的 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，然後前往 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

客戶警告過我們，派羅的不法之徒經常盯上這條路線，這嚇跑了其他的運輸公司。請確保你的船隻裝備齊全，並且能夠容納 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>。另外別忘了帶一把<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_LuxuryGoods_.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_LuxuryGoods_.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

我們從一位大客戶那裡接到了合約，需要一位技術嫻熟的飛行員將一大批奢侈品從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 運送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

你的貨艙至少需要有容納 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>的空間。你還需要一把<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>來裝卸貨物。

另外要提醒一下，你運送的東西非常昂貴，可能會引來一些不必要的關注。如果你無法擺脫追蹤，<EM4>請做好自衛的準備</EM4>。

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_Rev.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_Rev.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

紅風需要一位經驗豐富的飛行員將一大批原始亡魂樹（Revenant Tree）花粉從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 運送到以下地點：

送貨地點（任意順序）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

這可能是不言而喻的，但繁榮公民（CFP）的代表要求我們向你保證，根據 UEE 法律，只要未經加工，運輸亡魂樹花粉是合法的。

在接受合約之前，請確保你的船隻最多可運載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>。如果你還沒有<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>，請購買一把，以使裝卸過程盡可能輕鬆。

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

You'll need enough room for <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

繁榮公民（CFP）緊急請求一位有戰鬥經驗的飛行員。他們的一些定居點正面臨直接威脅，可能很快就會受到攻擊，因此他們急需補給。

如果你有信心能夠在潛在的戰區中航行，請前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，拿取貨物，並將其帶到以下地點：

送貨地點（任意順序）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

你需要足夠的空間來容納 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>，以及你自己的<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>來裝卸所有物品。

請記住，如果有人試圖伏擊你，逃跑總是上策。但如果你被逼入絕境，請毫不猶豫地保護自己。

RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_Ran.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 [MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.
RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_Ran.tr:
紅風運輸
『您的貨物，妥善託付』
----------------------------

收到一位派羅農夫的請求，需要特殊的農業物資——具體來說是藍塔獸（Ranta）的糞便。顯然，普通的肥料效果不夠好。他們向多個分銷商下了訂單，需要有人把所有東西運回 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

以下是可以收集糞便的所有地點：

取貨地點（任意順序）

 [MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

客戶表示你的船隻至少需要能夠運載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4>。別忘了帶上你自己的<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>進行裝卸。

TheCollector_Ships_Meteor_Desc.en: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.
TheCollector_Ships_Meteor_Desc.tr: 流星很大。很重。有很多槍。但 Wikelo 找到方法讓它更好。你有東西，我會拿來做。\n\n就這樣。

roughready_salvage_M_desc_001.en:
Got word there’s a few ships near [LOCATION] just floating all by their lonesome. It’s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, we’ll sell them to you for a price. Then you’re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but I’m sure it won’t be anything you can’t handle.

- Smokey
roughready_salvage_M_desc_001.tr:
聽說在 [LOCATION] 附近，有幾艘船就這麼孤零零地漂著。
這可是筆不錯的回收貨，但我們的人現在都沒空動手。
所以先讓你優先考慮。

如果你想要坐標，我們可以賣給你——當然要付點代價。
拿到之後，這些殘骸就隨你處理，撿個乾淨然後賣個好價錢。
只不過你可能會遇到其他撿破爛的競爭對手，但我猜你應該能應付得了，對吧？

- Smokey

Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Levs.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Levs.tr:
Adagio 集團
驕傲的機會均等雇主

> 關於工作 <
為了協助滿足最近的一份特殊訂單，我們正在尋找承包商來協助採購回收複合材料 (RMC)、未精煉建築材料 (瓦礫、碎片或回收料) 和組件。工作內容為剝離並粉碎廢棄船隻，並使用<EM4>牽引光束</EM4>手動移除所需零件。

我們建議在拉格朗日點尋找殘骸，或者您可以試試倪克絲的小行星帶，也可以在您的合約管理器中向我們購買回收權。我們建議格外小心，因為該星系曾有 Vanduul 出沒的目擊報告，特別是考慮到您可能需要花費較長時間來尋找這份特定訂單的目標。

取得後，請將材料運送至位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運升降梯。

有關回收的建議，請參閱 mobiGlas 日誌中的<EM4>《回收業者指南：材料收集篇》</EM4>。

> 需求 <
     - 任何等級/尺寸的回收船
     - 手持牽引光束

> 免責聲明 <
承包商有責任確保其收集材料的來源載具符合相關 UEE 法律規定的公平回收標準。Adagio 集團對承包商犯下的任何罪行或輕罪概不負責，也不會對受這些行為影響的任何人提供賠償或補償。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- Trawler Scraper Module（打撈模組）
- Abrade Scraper Module（打撈模組）
- Cinch Scraper Module（打撈模組）


<EM4>Potential Blueprints</EM4>
- Trawler Scraper Module (Salvage Mod)
- Abrade Scraper Module (Salvage Mod)
- Cinch Scraper Module (Salvage Mod)

eckhart_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.tr:
艾克哈特安全有限責任公司
合約與派遣

合約類型：保衛船隻
批准代碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

立即處理

一位客戶在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近報告遇到麻煩。根據他們的通訊，聽起來不像是一次有組織、專業的攻擊。不過，我們受僱提供保護，而且他們也提出了要求。

需要一名承包商飛往那裡，控制局勢。

合約成功完成後將支付款項。

此合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權和/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定個人或實體使用。

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- R97 霰彈槍
- Monde 臂甲

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.en:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>4 Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.tr:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_M_Des.en:
A new gang who is proving to be a real pain in the ass for the Headhunters just upped the stakes by attacking the <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Never a good thing since we got interest in the welfare of the folks there, but doubly so because if they do too much damage it might royally screw an upcoming operation.

Head over there as soon as you're able and stop the attack before they can do any lasting damage. And if any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4> need a hand, I want you to look out for them too. Don't expect this gang to be pushovers but you should still be able to deal with them if you keep your head on.
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows
HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_M_Des.tr:
一個對獵頭者來說真的是個麻煩的新幫派剛剛加大了賭注，攻擊了位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>。這絕不是件好事，因為我們關心那裡的人們的福祉，更糟糕的是，如果他們造成太大的破壞，可能會嚴重搞砸即將進行的行動。

盡快前往那裡，在他們造成任何持久性破壞之前阻止襲擊。如果任何 <EM4>友方飛船</EM4> 需要幫助，我也希望你能照顧他們。別指望這個幫派會是軟柿子，但如果你保持冷靜，你還是應該能夠應付他們。
 
如果你需要任何額外的動力，我會為主要承包商增加 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4>。

- Stows

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_M_.en:
Our friends at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> have been compromised. A new gang in the area  are threatening them by targeting their <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>.  

If those get destroyed its going to be seriously bad for business, so I want you over there pronto on protection duty.  
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding <EM4>4 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_M_.tr:
我們在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的朋友處境堪憂。該地區一個新幫派正將目標對準他們的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 來威脅他們。

如果那些被摧毀，對生意會非常不利，所以我希望你立刻去那裡執行保護任務。
 
如果你需要任何額外的動力，我會為主要承包商增加 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4>。

- Stows

Headhunters_DefendLocation_M_Desc_001.en:
Our airspace around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been compromised. Enemy ships are threatening the base and any of our ships in the area. Gotta put a stop to this immediately, so get your shit in order and get over there. Just get going and I’ll update you with any relevant info on where you’re needed. 
 
If you need any extra motivation, I’m adding a bonus <EM4>5 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

- Stows

EckhartSecurity_Defend_E_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has intercepted comms between gang members and discovered that they’re planning an attack on <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Now they need our help to ensure the attack isn’t successful.   

Looking for a contractor who can defend the location from this offensive. Don’t have any specifics on the outlaws, but doubt they’re that skilled if our client cracked their comms so easily. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Defend_E_Desc_001.tr:
"Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：測驗 - 保衛據點
授權代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即處理

一位客戶截獲了幫派成員之間的通訊，發現他們正計劃襲擊 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。現在他們需要我們的協助，以確保這次襲擊不會成功。

我們正在尋找一位能夠保衛該地點免受這次攻勢的承包商。目前沒有關於這些法外狂徒的具體資訊，但如果我們的客戶能如此輕易地破解他們的通訊，那他們的技術應該不怎麼樣。

報酬將於合約成功完成後發放。

本合約不開放任何議價與協商。

此消息中可能包含機密、專有、特許保密的/或私人資訊，該等資料僅供上述指定的個人或實體使用。"

EckhartSecurity_Mercenary_Intro_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Trial - Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security is seeking skilled security professionals to join its ranks. If you believe that you have the disposition and experience to handle a wide variety of security contracts, then we encourage you to prove your proficiency by executing the contract below. 

Outlaws have been aggravating one of our clients by targeting their staff and operations. Based on the pattern established by previous attacks, we believe that these hostile forces will target <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> next. Successfully complete this contract to receive payment and more work opportunities from Eckhart Security. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

有一群法外狂徒正在針對我們的客戶，不斷對他們的員工與營運工作進行騷擾。根據過往襲擊的模式判斷，我們認為這些敵對勢力接下來將會以 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 作為目標。成功完成此合約後即可獲得報酬，並能在未來從 Eckhart 安全顧問處獲得更多工作機會。

Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client has requested a discreet contractor to infiltrate an ASD research site, locate a group of servers, and destroy the information stored on them permanently.

The client was able to share the location of the servers within the facility: the <EM4>Control Center in the Engineering wing</EM4>. The site has officially been shuttered, but there still may be hostile forces there. Be on your guard.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.tr:
Eckhart 安全顧問有限公司
合約 & 派遣

合約類型：銷毀伺服器
授權代碼：VS-14

需要立即處理

客戶要求一名謹慎的承包商潛入 ASD 研究站，找到一組伺服器，並永久銷毀儲存在上面的資訊。

客戶分享了伺服器在該設施內的位置：<EM4>工程大樓的控制中心</EM4>。該站點已正式關閉，但那裡可能仍有敵對勢力。請保持警惕。

成功完成合約後將發放報酬。

cfp_defendship_Intro_Desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_Intro_Desc_001.tr:
繁榮公民組織需要有纏鬥經驗的飛行員。如果你想測試你的技能，這裡有個任務讓你試試。

一艘民用船隻在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近請求戰鬥支援。前往那裡，向我們展示你有能力在​​這類任務中脫穎而出，我們會善加利用你的才華。

請注意。這個任務不是訓練演習。這是一次真實的遭遇戰，所以請盡力拯救遇險的船隻。

祝你好運，

利馬·恩迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民組織

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc_001.en:
Got an opportunity for someone eager to show off their flying skills. Headhunters have been running afoul of this numbrain flying a<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’re gonna put a stop to it once and for all.

You’re gonna help us set a trap for them. See, there’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. 

Head there, hide inside the cloud by powering down your ship, and attack the asshole as soon as you see ‘em and other single-seaters dumb enough to fly with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And in honor of this being your first surprise attack for us, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc_001.tr:
給渴望展示飛行技巧的人一個機會。獵頭幫一直跟一個開<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>的白痴過不去，我們要一勞永逸地解決這件事。

你要幫我們設個陷阱。你看，在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近有一個<EM4>輻射雲</EM4>，他們經常飛經那裡。

去那裡，關掉船艦動力躲在雲裡，一看到那個混蛋和其他傻到跟他一起飛的單座機就攻擊。第一擊全靠你了，但我們會在附近部署一些支援船艦來完成任務。

為了紀念你為我們做的第一次突襲，任務結束時，主承包商將獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4>的額外獎勵。

史托斯，通話完畢。

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VE_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients has been the victim of consistent harassment so the time has come to send a clear cease-and-desist message by taking out their prized <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>.  The lowlife in question follows a fairly predictable routine making them susceptible to an ambush. We’ve identified <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as the ideal spot. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting. 

By the way, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> often flies alone but is sometimes joined by a friend in a single-seat ship. Neither should give you too much trouble, but we have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VE_desc.tr:
埃克哈特保全有限責任公司
合約與派遣

合約類型：船艦伏擊
批准碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

立即處理

我們的一位客戶一直受到騷擾，現在是時候發出一個明確的停止騷擾訊息了，方法就是幹掉他們珍愛的<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>。這個卑鄙的傢伙遵循一個相當可預測的路線，這使他們很容易遭到伏擊。我們已確定<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>為理想地點。那裡有一個<EM4>輻射雲</EM4>，你可以躲在裡面並關閉你的船艦動力等待。

順帶一提，<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>經常單獨飛行，但有時會有一個朋友駕駛單座船艦加入。兩者都不會給你帶來太大麻煩，但我們在該地區有其他承包商，一旦你發動攻擊，他們可以提供協助。

付款將在合約成功完成後發放。主要承包商還能獲得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] MG Scrip</EM4>的額外獎金。

此合約不可協商。

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_E_desc.en:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake [LOCATION]. The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by [TARGET] and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows
headhunters_EliminateSpecific_CFP_E_desc.tr:
我老大正在找個能出手的人。獵頭幫打算奪回[LOCATION]，但那裡的CFP傭兵已經做好了長期抗戰的準備。聽著，我們不想殺不必要的人，所以正在考慮其他方案。

那邊的防禦是由[TARGET]負責，我們的老大認為只要他倒下，其餘的人就會鳥獸散。流點血總比大開殺戒好，對吧？

Stows out。

Headhunters_EliminateAll_PAF_H_desc_001.en:
Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows
Headhunters_EliminateAll_PAF_H_desc_001.tr:
消息傳出我們正在擴展到史丹頓，一個當地的隊伍已經襲擊了我們幾個安全屋。我們成功地追蹤到這些混蛋，發現他們藏身在某個舊的哈索爾礦業基地。

 你有興趣讓他們見識一下獵頭幫是怎麼處理事情的嗎？如果有，趕緊前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，讓他們知道我們是認真的。

 
- Stows


Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows

headhunters_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_.en: This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at [LOCATION] who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.\n\n-Stows out
headhunters_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_.tr:
這是一項相當簡單的工作。我們在[LOCATION] 遇到了一些混蛋，他們一直以為自己比實際情況好。去切斷他們的電源，提醒他們獵頭幫說了算。

Stows out。

This is a fairly straightforward job. We got some assholes at [LOCATION] who have been thinking they're better than they are. Go and shut off their power to remind them that Headhunters are in charge.

-Stows out

Headhunters_SabotageRelays_CFP_001_Desc.en:
CFP think they’re safe over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> but we got big plans for them. You’re gonna pave the way for us by heading there and shutting down their comm towers.

There should be a <EM4>control terminal at the top</EM4> that you can use to shut the tower down. You get that sorted and they won’t be able to call for backup. Then we can show those skags who this system belongs to.

Most outposts use the same system, so this’ll come in handy next time you want to make sure reinforcements don’t mess with you.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SabotageRelays_CFP_001_Desc.tr:
CFP 認為他們在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 很安全，但我們對他們有大計劃。你將為我們鋪路，前往那裡並關閉他們的通訊塔。

<EM4>頂部應該有一個控制終端</EM4>，你可以用它來關閉塔。你把它搞定，他們就無法呼叫支援。然後我們就可以讓那些傢伙看看這個系統是誰的。

大多數前哨基地都使用相同的系統，所以下次你想確保增援部隊不會來煩你時，這會派上用場。


Stows 敬上。

CFP_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.en:
Citizens for Prosperity are eager to help the people of Pyro, and it starts with freeing them from the grasp of XenoThreat.

We’re preparing a team to infiltrate one of their outposts, but we need someone to go in ahead to take out their communication towers first. Once those towers are offline, they won’t be able to call for reinforcements and we can proceed with our plan.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and find the towers. At the <EM4>top is a control panel</EM4> that can be used to disable them.

Also, it’s worth noting that most outposts use a similar system, so you’ll know how to disable the comms towers rather than risk fighting reinforcement dropships when you’re doing other jobs.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.tr:
繁榮公民渴望幫助派羅的人民，而這一切都始於將他們從 XenoThreat 的魔掌中解放出來。

我們正在準備一個團隊滲透他們的一個前哨基地，但我們需要有人先去摧毀他們的通訊塔。一旦這些塔離線，他們就無法呼叫增援，我們就可以繼續我們的計畫。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 並找到塔。在 <EM4>頂部有一個控制面板</EM4>，可以用來禁用它們。

另外，值得注意的是，大多數前哨基地都使用類似的系統，所以你會知道如何禁用通訊塔，而不是冒著與增援運輸艦戰鬥的風險。

祝你好運，

Lima Endicott
首席調度員
繁榮公民組織

Headhunters_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.en:
We’re making a play to hit some XenoThreat assholes where it hurts but need to be smart about it. That’s why we’re sending you in first to take out their comm towers so they can’t call for backup. You do that and we can be in and out before they know it.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and climb the comm towers there. Should be a <EM4>control panel at the top</EM4> you can use to switch them off.

In fact, same goes for most other outposts. Rather than having to deal with reinforcements, you can just turn off the comm towers. But hey, if you wanna ring the bell to ghost a few more Xenothreat I ain’t complaining.

Stows out.
Headhunters_SabotageRelays_XT_001_Desc.tr:
我們正準備對一些 XenoThreat 的混蛋造成重創，但需要聰明行事。這就是為什麼我們先派你進去摧毀他們的通訊塔，這樣他們就無法呼叫支援。你辦到了，我們就能在他們不知不覺中進出。

前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 並爬上那裡的通訊塔。頂部應該有一個 <EM4>控制面板</EM4>，你可以用它來關閉它們。

事實上，大多數其他前哨基地也是如此。與其應付增援部隊，你可以直接關閉通訊塔。但是，嘿，如果你想敲響警鐘，多消滅幾個 Xenothreat，我也不會抱怨。


Stows 敬上。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.en:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>3 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.tr:
有興趣幫我們幹掉一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>嗎？

應該不會太麻煩。我們已經做了前期工作，發現他們預計很快會經過<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。只要在附近的星雲中隱蔽起來，就能好好地突襲他們。

他們可能會單獨行動，也可能會和一些朋友一起來。他們都會駕駛單座戰機，但在纏鬥中也能自保。我們會在該區域部署一些部隊，一旦開始行動，他們就能提供支援。

你成功完成任務，我會額外給原承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 理事會代幣</EM4>，作為對你出色工作的獎勵。

- Stows


Any interest in taking out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

headhunters_killship_gen_lrt_desc_001.en:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. [TARGET] is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to [LOCATION] and you should find [TARGET] flying around. 

Stows out.
headhunters_killship_gen_lrt_desc_001.tr:
有個臭不要臉的小混混需要被解決。[TARGET] 只是個低階小頭目，似乎學不會教訓。我們已經警告過他，要麼加入我們，要麼滾出這個星系，但他似乎不聽，現在我們已經沒耐性了。

去 [LOCATION] 看看，應該能找到 [TARGET] 在那附近飛行。

Stows out。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Hiya,

I've got a client who's been messaging me all morning about a shipment they were supposed to receive and when I checked up on the cargo it turns out that it's sitting completely still in the middle of space.

This is obviously bad for a number of reasons, and not just because I had to spend 20 minutes getting yelled at. Can you head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and see what happened? The original contract called for a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you've got that and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

Once you've got the cargo, can you make sure it's delivered to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>? Thanks a bunch.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
嗨，

我有一個客戶整個早上都在給我發訊息，詢問他們應該收到的一批貨，當我檢查貨物狀況時，結果發現它完全靜止在太空中。

這顯然非常糟糕，不只是因為我得花 20 分鐘被對方痛罵。您能前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 看看發生了什麼事嗎？原合約要求使用一艘能裝載 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦，所以請確保您備妥船隻和一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

拿到貨物後，您能確保它被送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯嗎？非常感謝。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·提耶諾
初級物流協調員
柯瓦雷克斯航運
「任何您需要的，送到您需要的任何地方。」







柯瓦雷克斯航運是一家有限責任公司。為了鼓勵及時交貨並防止貨運欺詐，柯瓦雷克斯航運將設置交貨時限，一旦到期，任何未交付的貨物都將被視為失竊並據此處理。總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Nyx_M_Plane.en:
CONTRACT: Mining Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
One of our prospecting teams recently confirmed that the asteroids which house QV Breaker Stations throughout Nyx's Keeger Belt contain a rare ore type, Sadaryx.

However, owing to the difficulty in access these stations and the inherent risks involved, we are seeking external mining crews to handle the extraction.

We do not have a confirmed location of where the Sadaryx deposits are located within the station, but would recommend starting with the cave sections where minerals naturally form. If you get really lucky, you may even find some crystals in storage that were mined by the old QV work crews.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
Your crew will need to gain access to a <EM4>QV Breaker Station</EM4>, collect the required <EM4>Sadaryx ore</EM4>, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This will require a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4> and a basic understanding of hand mining.

Our prospecting teams have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws. Caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Nyx_M_Plane.tr:
合約：採礦訂單
地點：倪克絲

細節：
我們的一支探勘隊伍最近確認，分佈在倪克絲基格小行星帶中的 QV 破岩站所在的小行星，含有一種稀有礦石「薩達里克斯 (Sadaryx)」。

然而，由於進入這些站點的困難度和固有的風險，我們正在尋找外部採礦團隊來處理開採。

我們沒有關於站內薩達里克斯礦床確切位置的確認地點，但建議從礦物自然形成的洞穴部分開始。如果您運氣夠好，您甚至可能會在儲藏室中找到一些由舊 QV 工作團隊開採的水晶。

<EM4>條款*：</EM4>
您的團隊需要進入一個 <EM4>QV 破岩站</EM4>，收集所需的 <EM4>薩達里克斯礦石</EM4>，並將其送到位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。

這將需要一具帶有 <EM4>採礦附件的多功能工具</EM4> 以及對手工採礦的基本了解。

我們的探勘隊伍回報這些站點可能已被不法分子滲透。建議保持謹慎。

*接受此合約即表示您承擔此處所概述工作相關的任何及所有風險，且舒賓星際決不對合約期間產生的任何損害負責。

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Intro_Local.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TECH PREVIEW TESTING:
Complete this mission to get blueprints for Volt weapons. For this test, these blueprints have some slots that accepting different materials for varying stat adjustments.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract."
Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Intro_Local.tr:
發布：採購訂單
地點：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

技術預覽測試：
完成此任務可獲取伏特 (VOLT) 武器藍圖。在這次測試中，這些藍圖有一些可容納不同材料以調整屬性的插槽。

[LOCATION] 如需可找到這些礦物地點的全面清單，請參閱您 mobiGlas 日誌中的 <EM4>採礦基礎 #2：去哪裡採礦</EM4>。當您在那裡時，如果您想複習如何獲取材料，請隨時閱讀第一部分 <EM4>採礦基礎 #1：基本概述</EM4>。

由於這是一份採購訂單而非採礦合約，您需要提供自己的設備，例如 <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

準備好向我們出售所需材料後，請將其存放在位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯中。

*接受此合約即表示您承擔此處所概述工作相關的任何及所有風險，且舒賓星際決不對合約期間產生的任何損害負責。

[LOCATION] 如需可找到這些礦物地點的全面清單，請參閱您 mobiGlas 日誌中的 <EM4>採礦基礎 #2：去哪裡採礦</EM4>。當您在那裡時，如果您想複習如何獲取材料，請隨時閱讀第一部分 <EM4>採礦基礎 #1：基本概述</EM4>。

Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_Nyx_E_Local.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_Nyx_E_Local.tr:
公告：採購訂單
地點：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

條款*：
由於我們採購管道的變更，舒賓星際目前正尋求向在該地區作業的獨立礦工購買各種精煉材料。雖然在貿易中心出售可能會比完成我們的訂單獲得更有競爭力的價格，但許多礦工發現，加強與舒賓的關係對其職業生涯來說是一項明智的長期投資。

[LOCATION] 如需查找這些礦物的完整列表，請查閱您的 mobiGlas日誌中的<EM4>採礦基礎知識 #2：何處採礦</EM4>。既然都在那了，如果您想複習如何獲取這些材料，請隨時閱讀第一部分<EM4>採礦基礎知識 #1：基本概述</EM4>。

由於這是一份採購訂單而非採礦合約，您需要自行準備設備，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

請注意，為了加快這些材料的後續使用，<EM4>它們必須在交付前進行精煉</EM4>。這可以在任何精煉廠完成，其位置可以在您的星圖（Starmap）中找到。

一旦您準備好向我們出售所需的精煉材料，請將它們存入位於<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯。

*接受此合約即表示您承擔本文所述工作相關的所有風險，舒賓星際絕不對合約期間產生的任何損害負責。

[LOCATION] 如需查找這些礦物的完整列表，請查閱您的 mobiGlas日誌中的<EM4>採礦基礎知識 #2：何處採礦</EM4>。既然都在那了，如果您想複習如何獲取這些材料，請隨時閱讀第一部分<EM4>採礦基礎知識 #1：基本概述</EM4>。

由於這是一份採購訂單而非採礦合約，您需要自行準備設備，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

一旦您準備好向我們出售所需材料，請將它們存入位於<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯。

*接受此合約即表示您承擔本文所述工作相關的所有風險，舒賓星際絕不對合約期間產生的任何損害負責。

Shubin_Industrial_GroundVehicle_Stanton_.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Industrial_GroundVehicle_Stanton_.tr:
公告：採購訂單
地點：<EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

條款*：
由於我們採購管道的變更，舒賓星際目前正尋求向在該地區作業的獨立礦工購買各種材料。雖然在貿易中心出售可能會比完成我們的訂單獲得更有競爭力的價格，但許多礦工發現，加強與舒賓的關係對其職業生涯來說是一項明智的長期投資。

TheCollector_Ships_F8C_Stealth_Desc.en: Have the pieces to build useful ship for people who like to sneak then fight. Take F8C ship and make even better. Have put what Wikelo will need to build for you. Now you decide. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_F8C_Stealth_Desc.tr: 準備好零件，為喜歡潛行而非戰鬥的玩家打造實用的飛船。為 F8C 飛船來打造更強大的飛船吧。 Wikelo 所需的零件都已準備好，現在由你決定吧。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Ion_Desc.en: Starfighter Ion good ship, but it could be more sneak, yes? Surprise your not friends when you shoot them. I help with this for you. I need the right items and then I can give to you. Bring to me. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Ion_Desc.tr: 星際戰鬥機「離子」是艘好船，但能不能更潛行一點，對吧？在你射擊他們的時候給你的非朋友一個驚喜。我可以幫你。我需要對的物品，然後我才能給你。帶給我。再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ZipZap.en:
Want to shoot long away and stay hiding. But it snowing? Wikelo have gun for you.

Bring things. I give.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ZipZap.tr:
想遠距離射擊並躲起來。但是下雪了？ Wikelo 有槍給你。 

帶東西來。我給。 

再見。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.en:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_M_Desc_001.tr:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 


Stows out.

Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Super_Desc_001.en:
Got a special assignment - Loads of packages ready to delivered across the system. Its a bit more than the usual so I'm only reaching out to my best contractors for this one.

Obviously, a part of that payment will be to cover your fuel because you'll be going super far with this one. You'll need all the usual as well like a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with space to store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Super_Desc_001.tr:
有一個特別的任務——大量準備在星系間運送的包裹。這比平常要多一點，所以我只聯繫我最優秀的承包商來做這個任務。

顯然，報酬的一部分將用於支付您的燃料費用，因為您這趟會走得很遠。您也需要所有常規設備，例如 <EM4>手持式牽引光束</EM4> 和一艘有足夠空間存放 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦。

祝好運，我就指望您了。

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·提耶諾
初級物流協調員
柯瓦雷克斯航運
「任何您需要的，送到您需要的任何地方。」







柯瓦雷克斯航運是一家有限責任公司。為了鼓勵及時交貨並防止貨運欺詐，柯瓦雷克斯航運將設置交貨時限，一旦到期，任何未交付的貨物都將被視為失竊並據此處理。總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。

TheCollector_Ships_Idris_Desc.en: Since Wikelo has done good business with you, make you this very special trade. Idris is a powerful ship perfect for big important person like you. Wikelo has even done mod to make it more dangerous! Bring me a few items and the ship is yours.
TheCollector_Ships_Idris_Desc.tr: 既然 Wikelo 跟你的生意做得不錯，給你這個非常特別的交易。伊德里斯 (Idris) 是強大的船，非常適合像你這樣的大人物。Wikelo 甚至做了改裝讓它更危險！帶給我一些物品，這艘船就是你的了。

Shubin_Industrial_ShipMining_VH_Org_Desc.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of refined materials. This purchase order is more complex than typical, requiring multiple mining methods, but since you've proven your skill thus far, we think you and your team are up for the challenge.

Reminder, <EM4>materials must be refined before delivery</EM4>, and since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

舒賓星際目前正尋求完成另一份各種精煉材料的採購訂單。這份採購訂單比一般的更為複雜，需要多種採礦方法，但既然您已經證明了自己的技術，我們認為您和您的團隊能夠勝任這項挑戰。

提醒您，<EM4>材料必須在交付前進行精煉</EM4>，且由於這是一份採購訂單而非採礦合約，您需要自行準備設備，例如<EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>。

CFP_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
I wouldn't normally ask someone to do something so risky, but these are exceptional circumstances.

Our pilot was transporting some vital cargo when they were targeted by a group of outlaws. Under no circumstances can we allow them to get their hands on the cargo.

With the size of the hostile force who attacked, you won't be able to do this on your own, you'll need to bring a skilled crew with you to  <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> in order to  take out these outlaws and get the cargo back. Make sure at least one of you has a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

If by some miracle you can get that cargo back, take it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

It's a lot to ask, but if you can pull this off you'll have my and the whole organizations appreciation.

Best of luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
我通常不會要求別人做這麼冒險的事，但這是特殊情況。

我們的飛行員在運送一些重要貨物時，遭到了一群不法分子的針對。我們在任何情況下都不能讓他們染指這批貨物。

考慮到襲擊敵軍的規模，您無法獨自完成這項任務，您需要帶領一支熟練的團隊前往 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 以消滅這些不法分子並奪回貨物。確保你們中至少有一人擁有一艘能存放 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦和一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4>。

如果奇蹟出現，您能找回那批貨物，請將其帶到位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。

這是個苛刻的要求，但如果您能成功辦到，您將獲得我與整個組織的感激。

祝您好運，

莉瑪·安迪科特
首席調度員
繁榮公民

<EM4>潛在藍圖</EM4>
- P8-SC 衝鋒槍
- C54 衝鋒槍

TheCollector_Ships_Spirit_C1_Desc.en: Wikelo love useful cargo ship. Spirit is very useful. If you want one, can make for you. Just bring me things and I will do. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Spirit_C1_Desc.tr: Wikelo 喜歡實用的貨船。魂靈很有用。如果你想要一艘，我可以幫你造。只要把東西帶給我，我就做。再見。

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.en:
We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>18 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.tr:
我們受到了一些似乎不樂見我們在這裡的人的阻撓。人們已經開始關注我們的據點，並開始派出小隊攻擊我們的船隻。您是否願意拜訪其中一些地點，以表明我們不會被嚇跑？

如果是的話，首先看看您 HUD 上<EM4>標示的地點</EM4>附近有什麼。從那裡開始，我會引導您前往我們需要檢查的其他幾個熱點。出發前最好先把事情安排好。我我建議裝滿彈藥並說服<EM4>兩個朋友</EM4>加入巡邏隊。

你為獵頭幫完成此事，我會確保原承包商獲得額外 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 理事會代幣</EM4>的獎勵。

Stows out。


We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Medium_Desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Looking for a competent contractor who can salvage a messy situation. A client's trusted pilot apparently wasn't so trustworthy and made off with a shipment. But thankfully our trackers are reporting the shipment's static for the moment, waiting to be picked up. If we play our cards right, there's still time to resolve this.

The abandoned ship is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and will need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the goods. A ship that can handle <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> is a necessity, and expect contact from whatever outlaws this double-crossing pilot was hoping to sell to. 

Once recovered, deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Medium_Desc.tr:
埃克哈特保全公司
合約與調度部門

合約類型：尋回貨物
批准代碼：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

急件處理

正在尋找一位能挽救這混亂局面的合格承包商。一位客戶信賴的飛行員顯然並不那麼值得信賴，並且帶著貨物逃跑了。但幸運的是，我們的追蹤器顯示這批貨物目前處於靜止狀態，正等待被取走。如果我們處理得當，還有時間解決這件事。

被遺棄的船艦位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，將需要一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 來運送貨物。一艘能處理 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦是必須的，並預期會與那位背信忘義的飛行員打算進行交易的不法分子發生接觸。

找回貨物後，將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯。

本合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權及/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定之個人或實體使用。

TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Inferno_D.en: Starfighter Inferno good ship, but what if you want it to be better ship at fighting? Wikelo knows just what to do. You bring me the items and I make it for you. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Starfighter_Inferno_D.tr: 星際戰鬥機「地獄火」是艘好船，但如果你想讓它在戰鬥中更強呢？威克洛知道該怎麼做。你把東西帶來給我，我幫你做。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_Crusader_A2_Desc.en: Bring Wikelo the things and I make you A2 Starlifter that fights better. Does war so good make you call it A1! Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Crusader_A2_Desc.tr: 把東西帶來給威克洛，我幫你把 A2 星際運輸機改得更好打。打仗打得讓你叫它 A1！再見。

Foxwell_Mercenary_Rehire_desc_001.en:
Due to a corporate restructuring, Foxwell has some new vacancies that need to be filled immediately. Foxwell knows you’ve previously expressed interest in this line of work, and we’re wondering if you would want to take another crack at a contract.

One of our clients needs support at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> where their security forces are struggling to handle an outlaw incursion. Head there and help the local forces get rid of the problem before it’s too late. 

Successfully complete this contract, and Foxwell would be happy to send more work your way.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_Mercenary_Rehire_desc_001.tr:
由於公司組織重組，Foxwell 有一些新的職缺需要立即填補。Foxwell 這邊知道你之前曾對這方面的工作表示興趣，我們想知道你是否願意再次嘗試一份合約。

我們的一位客戶在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 需要支援，他們的保全部隊正難以應付不法之徒的入侵。請前往該處並協助當地部隊在為時已晚之前解決這個問題。

成功完成這份合約後，Foxwell 將很樂意提供你更多的工作機會。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_Illegal_d.en:
I won’t bore you with the details, all you need to know is: one of our haulers got attacked and now our goods are sitting in a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Up to you how you get the goods out, but if you happen to ghost a few of our rivals in the process, I ain’t complaining. Once you’ve got the stuff take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, then we can sort your payment. 

A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.
Headhunters_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_Illegal_d.tr:
我不會用細節來煩你，你所需要知道的是：我們的一名運輸員遭到了襲擊，現在我們的貨物正放在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯裡。 

如何推出貨物取決於你，但如果你在這個過程中碰巧忽視了我們的幾個競爭對手，我不會抱怨。一旦你拿到了東西，請把它帶到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的貨運電梯，然後我們就可以整理你的付款了。

隨身帶著<EM4>手持牽引光束</EM4>是明智之舉。

Stows out

Up to you how you get the goods out, but if you happen to ghost a few of our rivals in the process, I ain’t complaining. Once you’ve got the stuff take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, then we can sort your payment.

Headhunters_DefendLocation_VH_Desc_001.en:
Looking for someone who can not only dogfight but recruit others to the Headhunters cause. Our operations center at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, along with any ships going to and from it, are being targeted by hostile forces. We need support there pronto. 

Not gonna lie, but there’s lots of heat around there. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. When you get your crew together, head out there and I’ll update you if there’s any flare ups in the area that need your attention.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_H_.en: Got word from some allies of ours over at [LOCATION] that they're coming under attack. A gang we've had run-ins with before are trying to take them over by first destroying their [OBJECTS]. This crew are mungers through and through, but they mean business and can handle themselves in a fight. It will take a bit of doing to make sure they don't blow up everything. You might even think about bringing some help along. Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor 6 Council Scrip. - Stows
Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_H_.tr: 我們在 [LOCATION] 的一些盟友傳來消息說他們遭到了襲擊。一個我們曾經交過手的幫派試圖透過首先摧毀他們的 [OBJECTS] 來接管他們。 這群人雖然是十足的廢物，但他們是動真格的，而且在戰鬥中能照顧好自己。要確保他們不會炸毀一切，需要費一番功夫。你甚至可能要考慮 帶些幫手 一起去。 處理好這件事，我會給主要承包商 [SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣。 - Stows

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_H_Des.en:
There's this small gang that continues to be a thorn in our side, and the bastards have just ambushed some friends over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Seems like they're doing their best to destroy the <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> there.

I need you and whatever <EM4>crew you can muster</EM4> on site stopping these mungers from blowing everything up and protecting any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4> that need a hand.

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor  <EM4>4 Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows
HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_H_Des.tr:
有一個一直讓我們頭疼的小幫派，那些混蛋剛剛在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 伏擊了我們的一些朋友。看來他們正在盡最大努力摧毀那裡的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>。

我需要你和 <EM4>你能召集的任何船員</EM4> 到現場阻止這些廢物炸毀一切，並保護任何需要幫助的 <EM4>友方飛船</EM4>。

處理好這件事，我會給主要承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 議會代幣</EM4>。

- Stows

headhunters_bombingrun_sabotage_servers_.en:
When will people learn that they can't just do whatever they feel like on Headhunter turf? These idiots are planning a big job and thought that I'd just let them get away with it? No way in hell.

I want you to fly to [LOCATION] and destroy their fuel tanks and data servers. Show them what the Headhunters really think of them.

Let's see them try to pull off anything after that.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_sabotage_servers_.tr:
怎麼還有人學不會，竟敢在獵頭的地盤上隨心所欲？這些白痴正在策劃一個大計劃，還以為我會讓他們得逞？別做夢了。

我要你飛到 [LOCATION]，摧毀他們的燃料儲備和資料伺服器。讓他們見識一下獵頭對他們的真正看法。

看他們怎麼在那之後再搞什麼花樣。

Stows out。

headhunters_bombingrun_M_desc_001.en:
Feels like everyone wants a piece of our pie these days. Scouts are reporting that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is crawling with some new gang who've got it in for us.

So let's show them why you don't mess with us. Take out their fuel stores and leave them stranded.

That oughta send a message.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_M_desc_001.tr:
感覺現在每個人都想分一杯羹。斥候報告指出，<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 爬滿了一個新幫派，他們把矛頭指向了我們。

所以讓我們向他們展示為什麼不要惹我們。摧毀他們的燃料儲存，讓他們寸步難行。

這應該能傳達一個強烈的訊息。

-斯托 留

Intersec_TSG_BombRun_Solo_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Shattered Blade
Equipment Specs: Combat Ships w/Ordnance
Briefing: 
Local assets have indicated that Shattered Blade elements are attempting to rebuild one of their stations and Intersec is looking for a pilot to make sure that doesn't happen.

They've managed to get basic turret defenses back online but currently only have <EM4>two power relays activated</EM4>. These will be your targets as they <EM4>cannot be destroyed by energy weapons, you will need to bring ballistic or ordnance to be effective</EM4>. 

Reactivation of this station will allow the Shattered Blade to try and reclaim a foothold in this system and we can't let that happen.

Good luck,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_TSG_BombRun_Solo_Desc_001.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：破碎之刃
裝備規格：配備軍火的戰鬥飛船
簡報：
當地資源表明，破碎之刃的成員正試圖重建他們的一個太空站，InterSec 正在尋找一名飛行員來確保這不會發生。

他們已經設法讓基礎的砲塔防禦系統重新上線，但目前只有 <EM4>兩個電源繼電器被啟動</EM4>。這些將是你的目標，因為它們 <EM4>無法被能量武器摧毀，你需要帶上實彈或軍械才能發揮作用</EM4>。

重新啟動這個太空站將使破碎之刃試圖重新在這個星系站穩腳跟，我們不能讓這種事情發生。

祝好運，

Deacon Tobin 
營運經理 
InterSec 防禦解決方案

本通訊包含僅供收件人使用的機密資訊。如果誤收，請忽略並通知發件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔個人風險，並必須在適用的情況下遵守 UEE 及星系法律。

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.en:
Hey,

Just our luck that we land one of the biggest contracts of our life and our hauler's engines seize up. They've tried their best to fix it but seems like it's just not happening.

Can you fly out to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and grab the cargo for us? It's really important that we show our client that we're just as reliable as the other big players out there.

Just so you know this is a large shipment. You'll need a ship that can handle <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Once you've transferred it to your ship, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll send confirmation to the client.

Considering the circumstances, we're paying above market rates to whoever can complete this.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.tr:
嘿，

真倒楣，我們剛拿下人生中最大的一份合約，我們的運輸員引擎就卡死了。他們盡力修理了，但看來還是不行。

您能飛到 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 幫我們拿到貨物嗎？我們必須向客戶展現我們和其他大公司一樣可靠，這點非常重要。

讓您知道一下，這是一批大型貨物。您需要一艘能處理 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 個貨櫃</EM4> 的船艦，以及一具 <EM4>重型牽引光束</EM4> 來移動全部貨物。一旦您將其轉移到您的船艦上，請將其送到 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯，我們將向客戶發送確認。

考量到這個狀況，我們將向能完成此任務的人支付高於市場行情的報酬。

謝謝，
雷耶斯·林
貨運物流協調員
林氏運輸







林氏運輸深知宇宙充滿危險且難以預料，並制定了數項協議來保護您和我們客戶的貨物。為確保您不會因無法控制的情況而受到懲罰，總付款將根據成功交付的貨物百分比按比例分配。每次運輸都會設定交貨計時器。任何在到期時仍未交付的貨物將被標記為失竊並據此處理。所有提取和運送必須自動裝載或在貨運電梯進行。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VGLflightsuit.en: Ships have big windows. Everyone can see you flying. You should look the best. Wikelo has very good flight suit for you. Do trade, bring me what I need and Wikelo give suit. Give blueprint as well if you do not have.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_VGLflightsuit.tr: 飛船有很大的窗戶。每個人都能看到你飛行。你應該看起來最棒。Wikelo 有非常好的飛行服給你。做個交易，帶來我需要的東西，Wikelo 就把衣服給你。如果你沒有，我也給你藍圖。

Shubin_Rockcracker_CollectLenses_Desc_00.en:
CONTRACT: Manufacturing Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
If you happen to have any other work bringing you to one of the QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, Shubin Interstellar would be highly interested in contracting you to obtaining a supply of hard-to-source mining laser focus lenses.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
While there may be some focus lenses that can be recovered from the QV Breaker Station's storage, you must likely will need to manufacture them using <EM4>Sadaryx crystals</EM4> and the on-site lens fabricator. While the ore is rare, these Breaker Stations typically have sadaryx veins that can be mined directly with a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4>.

Deliver the procured lenses to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for processing.

Contractors have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws, so caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.
Shubin_Rockcracker_CollectLenses_Desc_00.tr:
合約：製造訂單
地點：倪克絲

細節：
如果您剛好有其他工作將帶您前往基格小行星帶的其中一個 QV 破岩站，舒賓星際將非常有興趣與您簽約，以獲取一批難以取得的採礦雷射聚焦鏡片。

<EM4>條款*：</EM4>
雖然有些聚焦鏡片可能會從 QV 破岩站的儲藏室中找到，但您很可能需要使用 <EM4>薩達里克斯水晶</EM4> 和現場的鏡片製造機來製造它們。雖然這種礦石很罕見，但這些破岩站通常有可以直接用帶有 <EM4>採礦附件的多功能工具</EM4> 開採的薩達里克斯礦脈。

將取得的鏡片送到位於 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的貨運電梯進行處理。

承包商報告說，這些站點可能已被不法分子滲透，因此建議保持謹慎。

*接受此合約即表示您承擔此處所概述工作相關的任何及所有風險，且舒賓星際決不對合約期間產生的任何損害負責。

eckhart_defendship_LRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients got the brilliant idea to test their dogfighting skills in a real world scenario. Doesn’t sound like it’s going well, because they comm’d us asking for some support. 

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and help clean up the mess they created.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
eckhart_defendship_LRT_desc_001.tr:
艾克哈特安全有限責任公司
合約與派遣

合約類型：保衛船隻
批准代碼 = [APPROVAL_CODE]

立即處理

我們的一個客戶突發奇想，想在真實場景中測試他們的纏鬥技巧。聽起來情況不太妙，因為他們聯繫我們請求支援。

前往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，幫他們收拾殘局。

合約成功完成後將支付款項。

此合約不可協商。

此訊息可能包含機密、專有、特權和/或私人資訊。該資訊僅供上述指定個人或實體使用。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.en:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>1 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.tr:
有個笨蛋駕駛著一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>被抓到在監視我們的行動。我們警告他們後就把他們趕走了，結果又在其他地方發現他們做同樣的事情。既然他們沒聽懂，看來我們得給他們一個更嚴厲的教訓。

在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近有一片星雲，他們經常經過那裡。那是關閉電源、隱藏起來並發動突襲的最佳地點。有時他們單獨飛行，有時會有其他單座戰機跟隨。第一次攻擊將由你負責，但我們會部署一些支援艦在附近幫助完成任務。

如果你還需要額外的動力，完成這份工作後，原承包商將會獲得 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 理事會代幣</EM4>的額外獎勵。

Stows out.。

Foxwell_EliminateAll_desc_001.en:
Looking for someone willing to take out the trash at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Guess a gang has settled in without the permission of the owners. So they’ve hired us to get them out whatever way we see fit. 

I’d bring plenty of ammo, if I were you. Doubt they’ll want to leave willingly. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_desc_001.tr:
正在尋找願意去 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 清理門戶的人。看來有個幫派未經屋主同意就佔據了那裡。所以他們僱用我們用任何我們認為合適的方式把他們趕走。

如果我是你，我會帶上充足的彈藥。我懷疑他們不會乖乖離開。

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell 執法單位
「你的安全，由你定義」

Foxwell 執法單位是一家獲得UEE全境執業許可的安全擔保專家公司。我們一直在尋找新的幹員加入我們的團隊，如果您或您認識的人有興趣，歡迎與我們的合約負責人聯繫。

headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
Got word from my Judge that we're to take back some of the outposts that CFP have taken over. They're a little pissed that CFP's getting as much of a foothold in the system as they are and think it's making the Headhunters look weak.

Found a couple candidates near [LOCATION] that could use a sweep. Icing on the cake is that the head of security there is [TARGET]. Not sure if you've heard of 'em, but they shot up a handful of Clips last month, so it's a win-win. Get some territory back and punch out someone who could really stand to get got.

Stows out.
headhunters_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_Att.tr:
從我的老大那裡得到了命令，我們要奪回一些被繁榮公民佔領的前哨基地。他們有點惱火繁榮公民在星系中的勢力擴展，覺得這讓獵頭幫顯得很軟弱。

在 [LOCATION]附近找到了一些可以清掃的目標。更棒的是，那裡的安全負責人是 [TARGET]。不確定你有沒有聽過他們，但上個月他們掃射了一堆「Clip」，所以這是一舉兩得。奪回一些領土，還能把一個該死的傢伙解決掉。

Stows out。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.en:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>12 Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.tr:
有些人似乎對我們不滿意。我們得到消息，幾艘次級主力艦和一些護航艦正在針對我們的行動。我們認為阻止他們給我們製造麻煩的最佳方法是在他們攻擊我們之前先攻擊他們。

我們盯上了一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，它是這個小隊的一部分，看起來他們經常經過<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，那裡是進行突襲的絕佳地點。附近的星雲可以隱藏你和你帶來的任何幫手。完成任務後，原承包商將獲得額外 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT] 理事會代幣</EM4>的獎勵。

不拐彎抹角地說，這並不容易。但報酬應該值得你這麼做。而且，誰知道你在所有殘骸中會發現什麼好東西呢。

Stows out

Intersec_TSG_Group_Desc_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Shattered Blade
Equipment Specs: Strike Group
Briefing: 
We've received word that a People's Alliance security ship called Tranquility stumbled across  Shattered Blade hiding out in an old QV Extraction station. Details are sketchy but will connect you with local assets once on site. 

Intersec is looking for a team to intervene and protect the Tranquility and their personnel. Based on discussions with the Tranquility's captain, you will <EM4>need  ballistic and ordnance to break down the defenses of the station</EM4> and ultimately <EM4>get boots on the ground to save their pilot</EM4>.

<EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is absolutely critical. You will <EM4>need a variety of ship types</EM4> to balance multiple combat zones in space and on the ground.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Intersec_TSG_Group_Desc_001.tr:
任務規格

行動區域：倪克絲星系
敵對勢力：破碎之刃
裝備規格：攻擊小組
簡報：
我們收到消息，一艘名為寧靜號的人民聯盟安全飛船偶然發現了躲藏在舊 QV 提取站中的破碎之刃。細節尚不清楚，但一旦你到達現場將為你接通當地人員。

InterSec 正在尋找一支團隊來進行干預並保護寧靜號及其人員。根據與寧靜號艦長的討論，你將 <EM4>需要實彈和軍火來打破太空站的防禦</EM4>，並最終 <EM4>登陸以拯救他們的飛行員</EM4>。

<EM4>招募額外的飛船</EM4> 來支援你完成這項任務是絕對關鍵的。你將 <EM4>需要各種不同的飛船類型</EM4> 來平衡太空和地面的多個戰鬥區域。

致敬，

Deacon Tobin 
營運經理 
InterSec 防禦解決方案

本通訊包含僅供收件人使用的機密資訊。如果誤收，請忽略並通知發件人。所有行動均由承包商自行承擔個人風險，並必須在適用的情況下遵守 UEE 及星系法律。
